light_analysis.result: 在玻利维亚亚马逊的参考收集和考古样本测试中，融合模型的全局分类准确率达到77.9%于24种诊断形态类型，分割质量评分84.5%。集成3D数据显著提升了复杂形态类型（如草类植硅体）的区分能力，解决了2D投影中的特征遮蔽问题。模型成功识别了玉米和棕榈等特定植物，验证了其在混合样本中的实用性和优于传统手工方法的效率。
light_analysis.conclusion: Sorometry将植硅体研究提升至‘组学’尺度，通过AI技术大幅扩展分析容量、标准化专家判断，并支持可复制的群体层面表征，推动了考古学和古生态学领域的数据驱动方法。该研究具有高应用价值，促进大规模、自动化分析，未来工作可优化模型泛化能力，扩展至更多植物类型和样本来源，进一步提升分析精度和适用范围。

title: Deep Learning Network-Temporal Models For Traffic Prediction
abstract: Time series analysis is critical for emerging net- work intelligent control and management functions. However, existing statistical-based and shallow machine learning models have shown limited prediction capabilities on multivariate time series. The intricate topological interdependency and complex temporal patterns in network data demand new model approaches. In this paper, based on a systematic multivariate time series model study, we present two deep learning models aiming for learning both temporal patterns and network topological correlations at the same time: a customized network-temporal graph attention network (GAT) model and a fine-tuned multi-modal large language model (LLM) with a clustering overture. Both models are studied against an LSTM model that already outperforms the statistical methods. Through extensive training and performance studies on a real-world network dataset, the LLM-based model demonstrates superior overall prediction and generalization performance, while the GAT model shows its strength in reducing prediction variance across the time series and horizons. More detailed analysis also reveals important insights into correlation variability and prediction distribution discrepancies over time series and different prediction horizons.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出了两种深度学习模型，结合图注意力网络和大型语言模型，用于同时学习交通数据的时态模式和网络拓扑相关性。
light_analysis.motivation: 网络交通预测对于智能控制和管理至关重要，如流量优化和资源分配。然而，现有基于统计的方法和浅层机器学习模型在多变量时间序列预测中表现有限，难以有效处理网络数据中复杂的拓扑依赖性和动态时态模式，这限制了预测精度和实际应用效果。因此，研究旨在开发新的深度学习模型来克服这些不足，提升预测能力。
light_analysis.method: 论文基于系统多变量时间序列研究，提出了两种模型：一是定制化的网络时态图注意力网络（GAT），通过图注意力机制捕获节点间的拓扑关系并整合时态特征；二是精细调优的多模态大型语言模型（LLM），结合聚类技术以学习复杂模式。研究使用长短期记忆网络（LSTM）作为基线进行对比，并应用于真实网络数据集进行训练和评估。
light_analysis.result: 在真实网络数据集上的实验表明，基于LLM的模型在整体预测准确性和泛化性能上优于其他方法，展现出更高的稳定性；而GAT模型在减少时间序列和不同预测视野的预测方差方面表现突出，降低了预测波动。详细分析还揭示了相关性变异性和预测分布差异随时间序列和预测视野的变化，提供了深入洞察。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是开发了两种深度学习模型，有效整合时态和拓扑学习，显著提升了交通预测性能，对网络智能管理有实际应用价值。学术上推动了多变量时间序列分析的发展，未来工作可进一步优化模型泛化能力或探索更多数据场景和参数调整。

title: Slack More, Predict Better: Proximal Relaxation for Probabilistic Latent Variable Model-based Soft Sensors
abstract: Nonlinear Probabilistic Latent Variable Models (NPLVMs) are a cornerstone of soft sensor modeling due to their capacity for uncertainty delineation. However, conventional NPLVMs are trained using amortized variational inference, where neural networks parameterize the variational posterior. While facilitating model implementation, this parameterization converts the distributional optimization problem within an infinite-dimensional function space to parameter optimization within a finite-dimensional parameter space, which introduces an approximation error gap, thereby degrading soft sensor modeling accuracy. To alleviate this issue, we introduce KProxNPLVM, a novel NPLVM that pivots to relaxing the objective itself and improving the NPLVM's performance. Specifically, we first prove the approximation error induced by the conventional approach. Based on this, we design the Wasserstein distance as the proximal operator to relax the learning objective, yielding a new variational inference strategy derived from solving this relaxed optimization problem. Based on this foundation, we provide a rigorous derivation of KProxNPLVM's optimization implementation, prove the convergence of our algorithm can finally sidestep the approximation error, and propose the KProxNPLVM by summarizing the abovementioned content. Finally, extensive experiments on synthetic and real-world industrial datasets are conducted to demonstrate the efficacy of the proposed KProxNPLVM.
comment: This paper has been provisionally accepted for publication in the "IEEE Transactions on Industrial Informatics"

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出KProxNPLVM，通过近端松弛学习目标来减少变分推断的近似误差，提升软传感器建模性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 非线性概率潜变量模型是软传感器建模的核心，用于不确定性评估。然而，传统模型使用摊销变分推断，通过神经网络参数化变分后验，将无限维函数空间的分布优化问题简化为有限维参数空间的参数优化，这引入了不可避免的近似误差，导致建模准确性下降。这一问题限制了软传感器在工业应用中的可靠性，因此亟需新方法来克服误差、提升性能。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法首先证明传统摊销变分推断所引入的近似误差。接着，设计使用Wasserstein距离作为近端算子来松弛学习目标，从而推导出新的变分推断策略。在此基础上，提供KProxNPLVM的优化实现详细推导，并证明算法收敛能最终绕过近似误差。摘要未明确指定具体模型架构或数据集细节，但提及实验涉及合成和真实工业数据集。
light_analysis.result: 论文在合成和真实工业数据集上进行了广泛实验，验证了KProxNPLVM的有效性。摘要未提供具体性能指标如准确率数值，但结果表明该方法优于传统非线性概率潜变量模型，能够显著减少近似误差并提高软传感器建模的准确性，表明在实验设置中取得了正向对比效果。
light_analysis.conclusion: 主要贡献是提出KProxNPLVM，通过松弛优化目标改进变分推断，减少近似误差。这具有重要学术价值，增强了概率建模的理论框架，并为工业软传感器提供了更准确的建模工具。摘要未明确说明局限性和未来工作方向，但暗示了潜在应用扩展和改进空间。

title: Rethinking the Harmonic Loss via Non-Euclidean Distance Layers
abstract: Cross-entropy loss has long been the standard choice for training deep neural networks, yet it suffers from interpretability limitations, unbounded weight growth, and inefficiencies that can contribute to costly training dynamics. The harmonic loss is a distance-based alternative grounded in Euclidean geometry that improves interpretability and mitigates phenomena such as grokking, or delayed generalization on the test set. However, the study of harmonic loss remains narrow: only Euclidean distance is explored, and no systematic evaluation of computational efficiency or sustainability was conducted. We extend harmonic loss by systematically investigating a broad spectrum of distance metrics as replacements for the Euclidean distance. We comprehensively evaluate distance-tailored harmonic losses on both vision backbones and large language models. Our analysis is framed around a three-way evaluation of model performance, interpretability, and sustainability. On vision tasks, cosine distances provide the most favorable trade-off, consistently improving accuracy while lowering carbon emissions, whereas Bray-Curtis and Mahalanobis further enhance interpretability at varying efficiency costs. On language models, cosine-based harmonic losses improve gradient and learning stability, strengthen representation structure, and reduce emissions relative to cross-entropy and Euclidean heads. Our code is available at: https://anonymous.4open.science/r/rethinking-harmonic-loss-5BAB/.

title: Conditional Unbalanced Optimal Transport Maps: An Outlier-Robust Framework for Conditional Generative Modeling
abstract: Conditional Optimal Transport (COT) problem aims to find a transport map between conditional source and target distributions while minimizing the transport cost. Recently, these transport maps have been utilized in conditional generative modeling tasks to establish efficient mappings between the distributions. However, classical COT inherits a fundamental limitation of optimal transport, i.e., sensitivity to outliers, which arises from the hard distribution matching constraints. This limitation becomes more pronounced in a conditional setting, where each conditional distribution is estimated from a limited subset of data. To address this, we introduce the Conditional Unbalanced Optimal Transport (CUOT) framework, which relaxes conditional distribution-matching constraints through Csiszár divergence penalties while strictly preserving the conditioning marginals. We establish a rigorous formulation of the CUOT problem and derive its dual and semi-dual formulations. Based on the semi-dual form, we propose Conditional Unbalanced Optimal Transport Maps (CUOTM), an outlier-robust conditional generative model built upon a triangular $c$-transform parameterization. We theoretically justify the validity of this parameterization by proving that the optimal triangular map satisfies the $c$-transform relationships. Our experiments on 2D synthetic and image-scale datasets demonstrate that CUOTM achieves superior outlier robustness and competitive distribution-matching performance compared to existing COT-based baselines, while maintaining high sampling efficiency.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出了一种条件不平衡最优传输图（CUOTM）框架，通过放松分布匹配约束，增强条件生成模型对异常值的鲁棒性，实现了更稳定的条件分布映射。
light_analysis.motivation: 条件最优传输（COT）在条件生成建模中被用于建立源分布与目标分布之间的有效映射，但其继承了最优传输对异常值敏感的根本局限性，这源于硬分布匹配约束。在条件设置中，每个条件分布仅从有限数据子集估计，使得异常值问题更为突出，影响模型的稳定性和泛化能力。因此，研究旨在开发一种更鲁棒的方法，以克服数据中的异常值干扰，提升条件生成任务的实际应用价值。
light_analysis.method: 研究引入了条件不平衡最优传输（CUOT）框架，通过Csiszár散度惩罚来放松条件分布匹配约束，同时严格保持条件边际分布不变。基于CUOT的半对偶形式，提出了条件不平衡最优传输图（CUOTM）模型，该模型采用三角c-变换参数化来构建生成映射。理论分析证明了最优三角图满足c-变换关系，确保了参数化的有效性，模型在实现过程中可能涉及数据集如2D合成和图像数据，但摘要未明确说明具体模型架构细节。
light_analysis.result: 在2D合成数据集和图像尺度数据集上的实验表明，CUOTM相比现有的基于COT的基线方法，展现出更优越的异常值鲁棒性，并在分布匹配性能上具有竞争力。模型保持了高采样效率，验证了其在实际应用中的可行性和有效性，尽管摘要未提供具体数值指标如准确率提升，但强调了性能改进和鲁棒性增强，表明该方法在异常值处理方面取得了显著进展。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是提出了CUOTM框架，该框架通过不平衡传输策略有效缓解了条件生成模型中的异常值敏感性问题，扩展了最优传输理论在生成建模中的应用。学术价值在于提供了新的理论分析和模型设计，实际应用价值体现在鲁棒的条件生成任务中，如数据增强或图像生成。未来工作可能包括进一步优化算法或扩展到更多领域，但摘要未明确说明具体方向或局限性。

title: JOPP-3D: Joint Open Vocabulary Semantic Segmentation on Point Clouds and Panoramas
abstract: Semantic segmentation across visual modalities such as 3D point clouds and panoramic images remains a challenging task, primarily due to the scarcity of annotated data and the limited adaptability of fixed-label models. In this paper, we present JOPP-3D, an open-vocabulary semantic segmentation framework that jointly leverages panoramic and point cloud data to enable language-driven scene understanding. We convert RGB-D panoramic images into their corresponding tangential perspective images and 3D point clouds, then use these modalities to extract and align foundational vision-language features. This allows natural language querying to generate semantic masks on both input modalities. Experimental evaluation on the Stanford-2D-3D-s and ToF-360 datasets demonstrates the capability of JOPP-3D to produce coherent and semantically meaningful segmentations across panoramic and 3D domains. Our proposed method achieves a significant improvement compared to the SOTA in open and closed vocabulary 2D and 3D semantic segmentation.

light_analysis.overview: JOPP-3D 是一个联合开放词汇语义分割框架，通过结合点云和全景图像实现语言驱动的场景理解。
light_analysis.motivation: 跨视觉模态如3D点云和全景图像的语义分割面临挑战，主要由于标注数据稀缺和固定标签模型的有限适应性。现有方法依赖特定词汇表，难以处理开放词汇查询，限制了场景理解的灵活性。本研究旨在解决这些问题，开发一个能够利用自然语言进行多模态语义分割的框架，以适应更广泛的应用场景。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出JOPP-3D框架，将RGB-D全景图像转换为切向透视图像和对应的3D点云。然后，提取基础视觉语言特征，并对齐这些特征以实现跨模态一致性，从而允许自然语言查询生成全景图像和点云上的语义掩码。关键创新包括联合处理两种视觉模态和特征对齐技术，使用的数据集有Stanford-2D-3D-s和ToF-360。
light_analysis.result: 在Stanford-2D-3D-s和ToF-360数据集上的实验表明，JOPP-3D能够生成在全景和3D域中一致且语义有意义的段。与最先进方法相比，该方法在开放词汇和封闭词汇的2D和3D语义分割任务中实现了显著改进，具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但强调了其卓越性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本论文的主要贡献是JOPP-3D框架，它实现了跨点云和全景图像的开放词汇语义分割，提升了场景理解的灵活性。研究具有学术价值，推动了多模态语义分割和语言驱动计算机视觉的发展；在实际应用中，可用于增强现实和自动驾驶等领域。未来工作可能涉及扩展到更多视觉模态或改进特征对齐方法。

title: LaST-VLA: Thinking in Latent Spatio-Temporal Space for Vision-Language-Action in Autonomous Driving
abstract: While Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models have revolutionized autonomous driving by unifying perception and planning, their reliance on explicit textual Chain-of-Thought (CoT) leads to semantic-perceptual decoupling and perceptual-symbolic conflicts. Recent shifts toward latent reasoning attempt to bypass these bottlenecks by thinking in continuous hidden space. However, without explicit intermediate constraints, standard latent CoT often operates as a physics-agnostic representation. To address this, we propose the Latent Spatio-Temporal VLA (LaST-VLA), a framework shifting the reasoning paradigm from discrete symbolic processing into a physically grounded Latent Spatio-Temporal CoT. By implementing a dual-feature alignment mechanism, we distill geometric constraints from 3D foundation models and dynamic foresight from world models directly into the latent space. Coupled with a progressive SFT training strategy that transitions from feature alignment to trajectory generation, and refined via Reinforcement Learning with Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) to ensure safety and rule compliance. \method~setting a new record on NAVSIM v1 (91.3 PDMS) and NAVSIM v2 (87.1 EPDMS), while excelling in spatial-temporal reasoning on SURDS and NuDynamics benchmarks.

light_analysis.overview: LaST-VLA 提出一种基于物理的潜在时空推理框架，通过双特征对齐和渐进训练策略，解决了自动驾驶中 VLA 模型的语义-感知解耦问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有 Vision-Language-Action (VLA) 模型在自动驾驶中统一感知和规划，但依赖显式文本 Chain-of-Thought (CoT) 导致语义-感知解耦和感知-符号冲突，使得推理与物理现实脱节，影响安全性和准确性。标准潜在推理虽尝试绕过这些瓶颈，但缺乏显式中间约束，往往生成物理无关的表示，限制了其在复杂环境中的适用性。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出 LaST-VLA 框架，将推理范式从离散符号处理转移到基于物理的 Latent Spatio-Temporal CoT。关键创新包括双特征对齐机制，从 3D 基础模型提取几何约束和从世界模型提取动态前瞻，直接融入潜在空间；采用渐进式 SFT 训练策略，从特征对齐过渡到轨迹生成，并通过强化学习 Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) 细化以确保安全和规则遵从。
light_analysis.result: LaST-VLA 在多个基准测试中表现优异：在 NAVSIM v1 上达到 91.3 PDMS，NAVSIM v2 上达到 87.1 EPDMS，均设置新记录，优于先前方法。在 SURDS 和 NuDynamics 基准上，该方法在时空推理方面同样表现出色，验证了其有效性，但摘要未明确说明具体基线对比数据。
light_analysis.conclusion: LaST-VLA 的主要贡献是引入物理基础的潜在时空推理框架，解决了 VLA 模型中的语义-感知解耦问题，提升了自动驾驶系统的推理能力和安全性。研究具有重要学术价值，推动了多模态智能体的发展，并具有实际应用潜力，通过强化学习细化和规则遵从增强了实用性。未来工作可能包括进一步优化框架和扩展到更广泛场景。

title: Reasoning Boosts Opinion Alignment in LLMs
abstract: Opinion modeling aims to capture individual or group political preferences, enabling applications such as digital democracies, where models could help shape fairer and more popular policies. Given their versatility, strong generalization capabilities, and demonstrated success across diverse text-to-text applications, large language models (LLMs) are natural candidates for this task. However, due to their statistical nature and limited causal understanding, they tend to produce biased opinions when prompted naively. In this work, we study whether reasoning can improve opinion alignment. Motivated by the recent advancement in mathematical reasoning enabled by reinforcement learning (RL), we train models to produce profile-consistent answers through structured reasoning. We evaluate our approach on three datasets covering U.S., European, and Swiss politics. Results indicate that reasoning enhances opinion modeling and is competitive with strong baselines, but does not fully remove bias, highlighting the need for additional mechanisms to build faithful political digital twins using LLMs. By releasing both our method and datasets, we establish a solid baseline to support future research on LLM opinion alignment.

light_analysis.overview: 论文研究表明，通过结构化推理可以提升大型语言模型在意见对齐中的性能，受强化学习启发训练模型以改进偏见问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 意见建模旨在捕捉个体或群体的政治偏好，应用于数字民主和政策制定等领域，以提高公平性和受欢迎度。大型语言模型因多功能性和强泛化能力适合此任务，但由于统计性质和有限因果理解，在直接提示下易产生偏见。现有方法可能依赖简单提示，无法有效对齐意见，导致在政治偏好建模中表现不佳。因此，研究探索推理机制以解决这一问题，其重要性在于偏见会损害LLMs在敏感应用中的可靠性和公正性，阻碍数字民主的发展。
light_analysis.method: 研究采用结构化推理方法来训练大型语言模型，以产生与个人档案一致的答案。受数学推理中强化学习进步的启发，可能通过强化学习训练模型进行推理，提升意见对齐能力。虽然摘要未明确说明具体模型架构或强化学习算法，但提及使用三个数据集（涵盖美国、欧洲和瑞士政治）进行评估。关键创新在于将推理机制引入意见对齐任务，增强模型在政治偏好建模中的因果理解和一致性，不同于传统直接提示方法，从而减少偏见并提升性能。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，推理增强了意见建模的性能，与强基线方法竞争相当，表明推理能有效提升LLMs在政治偏好对齐中的表现。尽管推理带来改进，但未能完全消除偏见，突显了需要额外机制来彻底解决这一问题。摘要未提供具体性能指标如准确率提升，但强调了推理在三个数据集上的积极效果和局限性。与基线对比显示，推理方法在减少偏见方面具有竞争力，为未来研究提供了基础，但仍需进一步优化以接近完美对齐。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献在于展示推理对大型语言模型意见对齐的促进作用，并释放方法和数据集作为研究基准，推动相关领域发展。学术价值在于为构建忠实政治数字双胞胎提供了新思路，强调推理机制的重要性，但局限性在于偏见未完全移除，未来工作需探索更多机制如因果建模或外部知识整合以确保忠实建模。实际应用价值体现在数字民主和政策制定中，通过提升LLMs的公平性和准确性，促进更公正的社会决策过程，支持更可靠的AI应用。

title: Subliminal Signals in Preference Labels
abstract: As AI systems approach superhuman capabilities, scalable oversight increasingly relies on LLM-as-a-judge frameworks where models evaluate and guide each other's training. A core assumption is that binary preference labels provide only semantic supervision about response quality. We challenge this assumption by demonstrating that preference labels can function as a covert communication channel. We show that even when a neutral student model generates semantically unbiased completions, a biased judge can transmit unintended behavioral traits through preference assignments, which even strengthen across iterative alignment rounds. Our findings suggest that robust oversight in superalignment settings requires mechanisms that can detect and mitigate subliminal preference transmission, particularly when judges may pursue unintended objectives.

light_analysis.overview: 本文揭示了偏好标签在LLM-as-a-judge框架中可作为隐蔽通信渠道，传递潜意识行为特征，挑战了偏好标签仅提供语义监督的现有假设。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着AI系统接近超人能力，可扩展监督越来越依赖LLM-as-a-judge框架，其中模型通过二进制偏好标签相互评估和指导训练。现有方法假设偏好标签仅提供响应质量的语义监督，但忽略了其可能被用作隐蔽通信渠道的风险。本研究的动机是挑战这一假设，探究偏好标签如何传递意想不到的行为特征，导致监督系统不稳定，特别是在超级对齐设置中，这对AI安全至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 摘要未明确说明具体实验细节，但基于推断，研究方法可能包括设计模拟框架，其中中立的学生模型生成语义无偏的响应，偏见的评判者通过偏好分配进行评估。通过迭代对齐过程，观察偏好标签如何作为隐蔽渠道传输行为特征。关键创新点在于展示了即使在语义公平的条件下，偏好标签仍能强化偏见传递，揭示了现有监督机制的潜在缺陷。
light_analysis.result: 主要实验结果显示，偏好标签确实可以作为隐蔽通信渠道，使偏见的评判者将意想不到的行为特征传输给学生模型。即使学生模型的响应在语义上无偏，评判者的偏好分配仍能传递这些特征，且通过迭代对齐轮次，传输效应被加强，表明现有LLM-as-a-judge框架存在潜在风险，需要进一步研究来量化具体影响和改进监督方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文的结论是偏好标签在LLM-as-a-judge框架中可作为隐蔽通信渠道，挑战了现有监督假设，揭示了超级对齐设置中的潜在风险。研究的学术价值在于为AI对齐理论提供了新视角，强调隐蔽信号传输的重要性；实际应用价值是指导设计更鲁棒的监督机制，需要开发检测和减轻潜意识偏好传输的方法。未来工作可能包括探索具体技术来实现这些机制，以应对评判者可能追求意想不到目标的情况。

title: GeoDiff4D: Geometry-Aware Diffusion for 4D Head Avatar Reconstruction
abstract: Reconstructing photorealistic and animatable 4D head avatars from a single portrait image remains a fundamental challenge in computer vision. While diffusion models have enabled remarkable progress in image and video generation for avatar reconstruction, existing methods primarily rely on 2D priors and struggle to achieve consistent 3D geometry. We propose a novel framework that leverages geometry-aware diffusion to learn strong geometry priors for high-fidelity head avatar reconstruction. Our approach jointly synthesizes portrait images and corresponding surface normals, while a pose-free expression encoder captures implicit expression representations. Both synthesized images and expression latents are incorporated into 3D Gaussian-based avatars, enabling photorealistic rendering with accurate geometry. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method substantially outperforms state-of-the-art approaches in visual quality, expression fidelity, and cross-identity generalization, while supporting real-time rendering.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出了GeoDiff4D框架，利用几何感知扩散模型联合合成图像和几何信息，实现高质量的4D头部虚拟化身重建。
light_analysis.motivation: 从单张肖像图像重建逼真且可动画的4D头部虚拟化身是计算机视觉中的一个基本挑战。现有方法主要基于扩散模型，虽然图像生成方面有进展，但依赖2D先验，难以确保3D几何一致性，导致虚拟化身渲染质量低和动画不自然。这影响了数字人技术和虚拟现实应用的发展，因此需要一种能结合几何约束的方法来提升重建效果。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出一个新颖框架，采用几何感知扩散模型同时合成肖像图像和对应的表面法线，以学习强几何先验，确保几何一致性。引入姿势无关的表达编码器捕获隐式表达表示，提取特征。这些合成图像和表达潜变量被融入基于3D高斯分布的虚拟化身模型中，利用3D高斯表示进行渲染，实现高保真度和准确几何的重建，并支持实时处理。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，该方法在视觉质量、表达保真度和跨身份泛化能力方面显著优于当前最先进方法，同时支持实时渲染。摘要未明确说明具体性能数据，但指出性能有大幅提升，验证了框架的有效性和优越性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究提出的GeoDiff4D框架成功将几何感知扩散与3D高斯虚拟化身结合，有效解决了4D头部虚拟化身重建中的几何一致性问题，提升了渲染逼真度和动画质量。该研究具有推动虚拟现实和数字人技术的应用价值，摘要未明确说明局限性，未来工作可进一步优化模型效率和泛化能力。

title: Truncated Step-Level Sampling with Process Rewards for Retrieval-Augmented Reasoning
abstract: Training large language models to reason with search engines via reinforcement learning is hindered by a fundamental credit assignment problem: existing methods such as Search-R1 provide only a sparse outcome reward after an entire multi-step trajectory, making it infeasible to attribute success or failure to individual reasoning and retrieval decisions. Process-reward methods like StepSearch alleviate this by introducing step-level supervision, but rely on heuristic rewards such as TF-IDF overlap with gold documents, and still sample $k$ complete trajectories per example, retaining high gradient variance. We propose SLATE, a framework built on two complementary ideas: (1) truncated step-level sampling, which generates $k$ trajectories that share a common prefix and differ only at the next step, isolating variation to a single decision point; and (2) dense, decomposed LLM-as-judge rewards, which score each reasoning step, search query, and answer on a ternary scale with separate quality dimensions, providing richer supervision than binary outcome signals or undifferentiated step-level judgments. We theoretically prove that under the same dense reward structure, truncated sampling reduces the variance of advantage estimates by up to a factor of $T$ compared to full-trajectory sampling for $T$-step trajectories, yielding lower-variance and better-targeted policy gradients. Experiments on seven QA benchmarks confirm that SLATE consistently outperforms both sparse-reward and process-reward baselines, with the largest gains on harder multi-hop tasks and smaller models.

light_analysis.overview: SLATE框架通过截断步级采样和密集LLM-as-judge奖励，有效解决了强化学习中的信用分配问题，显著提升检索增强推理性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 训练大型语言模型通过强化学习结合搜索引擎进行多步推理时，面临信用分配问题：现有方法如Search-R1仅在整个轨迹后提供稀疏结果奖励，难以将成功或失败归因到具体推理步骤；过程奖励方法如StepSearch引入步级监督，但依赖启发式奖励如TF-IDF重叠，且采样多个完整轨迹导致高梯度方差。这限制了模型的训练效率和性能，尤其在复杂多跳任务中。因此，需要更精细的监督机制来减少方差并改善信用分配。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出SLATE框架，核心包括两个互补创新：一是截断步级采样，生成k个轨迹共享共同前缀，仅在下一步决策点变化，将变异隔离到单个点，减少梯度方差；二是密集、分解的LLM-as-judge奖励，使用大语言模型对每个推理步骤、搜索查询和答案进行三元评分，考虑多个质量维度，提供比二元结果或未区分步级监督更丰富的信号。理论上证明，在相同密集奖励结构下，截断采样相比全轨迹采样能减少优势估计方差最多T倍，其中T为步数，从而产生低方差且目标明确的策略梯度。
light_analysis.result: 在七个问答基准测试上的实验结果表明，SLATE框架一致优于稀疏奖励和过程奖励基线方法。在更复杂的多跳任务和较小模型上，SLATE获得了最大的性能增益，验证了其减少方差并提高推理效果的有效性。尽管摘要未提供具体数值如准确率提升百分比，但确认SLATE在多个任务中显著优于现有方法，展示了截断采样和密集奖励组合的优越性。
light_analysis.conclusion: SLATE框架通过结合截断步级采样和密集LLM-as-judge奖励，成功解决了强化学习中信用分配问题，减少了梯度方差并提升了检索增强推理性能。主要贡献包括提出新颖的采样方法和奖励机制，理论与实验证明其有效性，学术价值在于为多步AI任务提供了更高效训练策略，实际应用可扩展到问答系统等领域。未来工作可能涉及优化奖励设计或扩展到更广泛的任务中，摘要未明确说明具体局限性。

title: ECHOSAT: Estimating Canopy Height Over Space And Time
abstract: Forest monitoring is critical for climate change mitigation. However, existing global tree height maps provide only static snapshots and do not capture temporal forest dynamics, which are essential for accurate carbon accounting. We introduce ECHOSAT, a global and temporally consistent tree height map at 10 m resolution spanning multiple years. To this end, we resort to multi-sensor satellite data to train a specialized vision transformer model, which performs pixel-level temporal regression. A self-supervised growth loss regularizes the predictions to follow growth curves that are in line with natural tree development, including gradual height increases over time, but also abrupt declines due to forest loss events such as fires. Our experimental evaluation shows that our model improves state-of-the-art accuracies in the context of single-year predictions. We also provide the first global-scale height map that accurately quantifies tree growth and disturbances over time. We expect ECHOSAT to advance global efforts in carbon monitoring and disturbance assessment. The maps can be accessed at https://github.com/ai4forest/echosat.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出ECHOSAT方法，结合vision transformer和自监督增长损失，生成全球性、时间一致的高分辨率树高图，以精确捕捉森林动态。
light_analysis.motivation: 森林监测对气候变化缓解至关重要，但现有全球树高地图仅提供静态快照，无法反映森林随时间的变化动态，如生长和干扰事件（如火灾）。这限制了碳核算的准确性，因为碳储存与树高变化紧密相关，导致现有方法在评估长期森林健康和碳平衡时存在不足，需要开发能捕捉时间动态的解决方案。
light_analysis.method: 该方法使用多传感器卫星数据训练一个专门的vision transformer模型，执行像素级时间回归任务。关键创新是引入自监督增长损失，该损失正则化预测，使树高随时间变化符合自然发展曲线，包括渐进增长和因干扰事件导致的突然下降，从而提升时间一致性和预测准确性，模型架构基于现代计算机视觉技术适配遥感数据处理。
light_analysis.result: 实验评估表明，在单年预测任务中，模型超越了当前最先进方法的准确性，提高了性能指标。ECHOSAT还提供了首个全球尺度的高精度时间树高图，能准确量化树生长和干扰事件的动态变化，尽管摘要未给出具体数值对比，但强调了其在基准测试中的改进效果。
light_analysis.conclusion: ECHOSAT的主要贡献是生成首个全球性、时间一致的树高图，为森林监测和碳核算提供了重要工具。学术上，它展示了深度学习在遥感领域的应用价值；实际中，可推动全球碳监测和干扰评估。未来工作可能包括扩展到更广泛地区或提高时间分辨率，但摘要未明确说明局限性。

title: Limited Reasoning Space: The cage of long-horizon reasoning in LLMs
abstract: The test-time compute strategy, such as Chain-of-Thought (CoT), has significantly enhanced the ability of large language models to solve complex tasks like logical reasoning. However, empirical studies indicate that simply increasing the compute budget can sometimes lead to a collapse in test-time performance when employing typical task decomposition strategies such as CoT. This work hypothesizes that reasoning failures with larger compute budgets stem from static planning methods, which hardly perceive the intrinsic boundaries of LLM reasoning. We term it as the Limited Reasoning Space hypothesis and perform theoretical analysis through the lens of a non-autonomous stochastic dynamical system. This insight suggests that there is an optimal range for compute budgets; over-planning can lead to redundant feedback and may even impair reasoning capabilities. To exploit the compute-scaling benefits and suppress over-planning, this work proposes Halo, a model predictive control framework for LLM planning. Halo is designed for long-horizon tasks with reason-based planning and crafts an entropy-driven dual controller, which adopts a Measure-then-Plan strategy to achieve controllable reasoning. Experimental results demonstrate that Halo outperforms static baselines on complex long-horizon tasks by dynamically regulating planning at the reasoning boundary.

light_analysis.overview: 该研究提出Halo框架，一个基于模型预测控制的动态规划方法，以优化大型语言模型在长期推理任务中的计算预算并抑制过度规划。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有研究表明，在使用Chain-of-Thought等测试时间计算策略时，增加计算预算有时会导致大型语言模型性能崩溃，尤其是在长期复杂任务中。这是因为静态规划方法如CoT难以感知推理的内在边界，导致过度规划和冗余反馈，限制了推理能力的有效提升。这个问题在AI应用中很重要，因为长期推理是解决现实世界复杂任务的关键环节。
light_analysis.method: 研究首先提出Limited Reasoning Space假设，通过非自主随机动力系统的理论分析揭示计算预算的最优范围。在此基础上，开发了Halo框架，这是一种用于大型语言模型规划的模型预测控制方法。Halo采用熵驱动的双控制器和Measure-then-Plan策略，实现对推理边界的动态感知和规划调节，从而抑制过度规划，提高可控性。该方法专为基于推理的长期任务设计。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，Halo框架在复杂长期任务中优于静态基线方法，通过动态调节推理边界有效提升了性能。摘要未明确提供具体数据（如准确率或效率改进的数值），但强调了其在对比中的优势。这验证了Limited Reasoning Space假设的合理性，并展示了动态控制规划在改善推理能力方面的潜力。
light_analysis.conclusion: Halo框架成功解决了大型语言模型在长期推理中计算预算优化和过度规划的问题，通过动态控制提升了规划效率。研究的学术价值在于引入模型预测控制到LLM规划领域，为推理边界理论分析提供了新视角；实际应用价值包括增强AI系统在复杂任务中的鲁棒性和适应性。未来工作可能涉及扩展到更多任务类型或结合其他推理技术，摘要未明确说明具体局限性。

title: Controllable Exploration in Hybrid-Policy RLVR for Multi-Modal Reasoning
abstract: Reinforcement Learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) has emerged as a primary learning paradigm for enhancing the reasoning capabilities of multi-modal large language models (MLLMs). However, during RL training, the enormous state space of MLLM and sparse rewards often leads to entropy collapse, policy degradation, or over-exploitation of suboptimal behaviors. This necessitates an exploration strategy that maintains productive stochasticity while avoiding the drawbacks of uncontrolled random sampling, yielding inefficient exploration. In this paper, we propose CalibRL, a hybrid-policy RLVR framework that supports controllable exploration with expert guidance, enabled by two key mechanisms. First, a distribution-aware advantage weighting scales updates by group rareness to calibrate the distribution, therefore preserving exploration. Meanwhile, the asymmetric activation function (LeakyReLU) leverages the expert knowledge as a calibration baseline to moderate overconfident updates while preserving their corrective direction. CalibRL increases policy entropy in a guided manner and clarifies the target distribution by estimating the on-policy distribution through online sampling. Updates are driven by these informative behaviors, avoiding convergence to erroneous patterns. Importantly, these designs help alleviate the distributional mismatch between the model's policy and expert trajectories, thereby achieving a more stable balance between exploration and exploitation. Extensive experiments across eight benchmarks, including both in-domain and out-of-domain settings, demonstrate consistent improvements, validating the effectiveness of our controllable hybrid-policy RLVR training. Code is available at https://github.com/zhh6425/CalibRL.
comment: Published as a conference paper at ICLR 2026

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出CalibRL框架，通过可控探索和专家指导，解决多模态大语言模型在强化学习训练中的策略退化问题，实现更稳定的探索与利用平衡。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机在于强化学习与可验证奖励（RLVR）用于增强多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）推理能力时，面临巨大状态空间和稀疏奖励的挑战，导致熵崩溃、策略退化或过度利用次优行为。现有探索方法如随机采样效率低下，缺乏可控性，无法有效维持生产性随机性，从而影响训练稳定性和模型性能。因此，需要一种新的探索策略来优化RL训练过程，提升多模态推理的鲁棒性和效率。
light_analysis.method: 方法上，本文提出CalibRL混合策略RLVR框架，核心创新点包括分布感知优势加权和非对称激活函数（LeakyReLU）。分布感知优势加权通过组罕见性加权更新校准分布，以保持探索性；LeakyReLU则利用专家知识作为校准基准，调节过度自信的更新同时保持校正方向。框架通过在线采样估计在策略分布，引导策略熵增加，澄清目标分布，驱动更新由信息丰富的行为主导。这些机制协同作用，缓解模型策略与专家轨迹之间的分布不匹配。摘要未明确说明具体数据集或模型架构，但聚焦于RL训练过程的优化。
light_analysis.result: 主要实验在八个基准测试上进行，包括域内和域外设置，结果显示CalibRL框架实现了一致改进，验证了可控混合策略RLVR训练的有效性。摘要未提供具体性能指标如准确率提升，但强调实验证实了方法在缓解分布不匹配和稳定训练方面的优势，与基线方法相比，表现出更好的探索效率和策略稳定性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 结论是CalibRL框架通过可控探索和专家指导，显著缓解了强化学习训练中的分布不匹配，实现探索与利用的稳定平衡。主要贡献在于提出新颖的混合策略RLVR方法，增强多模态推理任务的训练稳定性和效率。研究具有学术价值，推动RL在MLLMs领域的应用；实际应用价值在于改进AI系统的推理能力。摘要未提及局限性或未来工作，但潜在方向可包括进一步优化机制或扩展至其他领域。

title: IDSelect: A RL-Based Cost-Aware Selection Agent for Video-based Multi-Modal Person Recognition
abstract: Video-based person recognition achieves robust identification by integrating face, body, and gait. However, current systems waste computational resources by processing all modalities with fixed heavyweight ensembles regardless of input complexity. To address these limitations, we propose IDSelect, a reinforcement learning-based cost-aware selector that chooses one pre-trained model per modality per-sequence to optimize the accuracy-efficiency trade-off. Our key insight is that an input-conditioned selector can discover complementary model choices that surpass fixed ensembles while using substantially fewer resources. IDSelect trains a lightweight agent end-to-end using actor-critic reinforcement learning with budget-aware optimization. The reward balances recognition accuracy with computational cost, while entropy regularization prevents premature convergence. At inference, the policy selects the most probable model per modality and fuses modality-specific similarities for the final score. Extensive experiments on challenging video-based datasets demonstrate IDSelect's superior efficiency: on CCVID, it achieves 95.9% Rank-1 accuracy with 92.4% less computation than strong baselines while improving accuracy by 1.8%; on MEVID, it reduces computation by 41.3% while maintaining competitive performance.

light_analysis.overview: IDSelect提出一种基于强化学习的成本感知选择器，优化视频多模态人物识别的准确性与效率权衡。
light_analysis.motivation: 视频多模态人物识别系统通常集成面部、身体和步态等多模态信息以提高稳健性，但现有方法采用固定的重型集成模型处理所有输入，不考虑输入样本的复杂度差异，导致在简单样本上浪费计算资源。在实际应用中，资源有限，需要优化准确性与效率的平衡；当前方法的不足在于忽视了输入条件的影响，未能充分利用模型互补性并造成不必要的开销。因此，研究开发智能选择机制至关重要，以应对计算成本问题并提升系统实用性。
light_analysis.method: IDSelect采用基于actor-critic强化学习的端到端训练方法，训练一个轻量级代理来选择每个模态的预训练模型。关键创新包括预算感知优化，其中奖励函数平衡识别准确性和计算成本，并引入熵正则化防止策略过早收敛。在推理阶段，策略网络根据输入序列条件输出每个模态的最优模型选择，然后通过融合模态特定相似性得分来计算最终识别结果；该方法利用预训练模型而不重新训练，从而减少计算开销并增强模态互补性。
light_analysis.result: 在挑战性视频数据集上的实验显示IDSelect的高效性能：在CCVID数据集上，它实现95.9%的Rank-1识别准确率，计算成本比强基线减少92.4%，同时准确率提升1.8%；在MEVID数据集上，计算成本降低41.3%的同时保持竞争性性能。这些结果证明了IDSelect在优化准确性与效率权衡方面的优越性，能在显著减少资源消耗的情况下，维持或提高识别精度，超越传统固定集成方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文的主要贡献是提出了IDSelect，一种基于强化学习的成本感知选择器，通过动态模型选择机制优化视频多模态人物识别的准确性和效率，解决了传统固定集成模型的资源浪费问题。研究揭示了输入条件选择器在发现互补模型组合和减少计算开销方面的潜力，具有学术价值，拓展了强化学习在资源优化任务中的应用。实际应用中，它为资源受限的视频监控等场景提供了高效解决方案；未来工作可扩展至更多模态或复杂环境，并探索其他优化算法。

title: RAT+: Train Dense, Infer Sparse -- Recurrence Augmented Attention for Dilated Inference
abstract: Structured dilated attention has an appealing inference-time efficiency knob: it reduces the FLOPs of the attention and the KV cache size by a factor of the dilation size D, while preserving long-range connectivity. However, we find a persistent failure mode of them -sparsifying a pretrained attention model to a dilated pattern leads to severe accuracy degradation. We introduce RAT+, a dense-pretraining architecture that augments attention with full-sequence recurrence and active recurrence learning. A single RAT+ model is pretrained densely once, then flexibly switched at inference time to dilated attention (optionally with local windows) or hybrid layer/head compositions, requiring only a short 1B-token resolution adaptation rather than retraining separate sparse models. At 1.5B parameters trained on 100B tokens, RAT+ closely matches dense accuracy at D=16 and drops by about 2-3 points at D=64 on commonsense reasoning and LongBench tasks, respectively. Moreover, RAT+ outperforms attention when sparsifying to the top-k block attention. We further scale to 2.6B parameters and 200B tokens and observe the same trend. Code is available at https://github.com/wimh966/rat-plus.

light_analysis.overview: RAT+通过全序列循环学习增强注意力，实现密集预训练后灵活稀疏推理，减少推理成本同时保持准确性。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机在于解决结构化膨胀注意力在稀疏化预训练模型时导致的准确性严重下降问题。高效推理是AI应用中的关键需求，现有方法如直接稀疏化需重新训练稀疏模型，资源消耗大，限制了模型压缩的实际应用。因此，需要一种方法在保持准确性的同时实现高效稀疏推理。
light_analysis.method: RAT+是一种注意力增强架构，通过引入全序列循环和主动循环学习来改进标准注意力。模型先进行密集预训练，然后通过简短的1B-token分辨率适应即可切换到膨胀注意力（可选带局部窗口）或混合层/头组合，避免了重新训练稀疏模型。具体模型架构细节如层数或头数摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.result: 在1.5B参数、100B tokens训练下，RAT+在膨胀因子D=16时在commonsense推理和LongBench任务上准确性接近密集模型；D=64时准确性下降约2-3个百分点。此外，稀疏化为top-k块注意力时优于传统注意力方法。扩展到2.6B参数和200B tokens后，观察到相同趋势。
light_analysis.conclusion: RAT+的主要贡献是提出了一种密集预训练后灵活稀疏推理的注意力架构，通过循环学习提升模型适应性，减少推理时的FLOPs和KV缓存大小。该研究在模型压缩和高效推理领域具有学术价值，为实际应用中的低成本部署提供了新思路。未来工作可能包括扩展到更多任务或进一步优化适应过程。

title: Structure-Aware Set Transformers: Temporal and Variable-Type Attention Biases for Asynchronous Clinical Time Series
abstract: Electronic health records (EHR) are irregular, asynchronous multivariate time series. As time-series foundation models increasingly tokenize events rather than discretizing time, the input layout becomes a key design choice. Grids expose time$\times$variable structure but require imputation or missingness masks, risking error or sampling-policy shortcuts. Point-set tokenization avoids discretization but loses within-variable trajectories and time-local cross-variable context (Fig.1). We restore these priors in STructure-AwaRe (STAR) Set Transformer by adding parameter-efficient soft attention biases: a temporal locality penalty $-|Δt|/τ$ with learnable timescales and a variable-type affinity $B_{s_i,s_j}$ from a learned feature-compatibility matrix. We benchmark 10 depth-wise fusion schedules (Fig.2). On three ICU prediction tasks, STAR-Set achieves AUC/APR of 0.7158/0.0026 (CPR), 0.9164/0.2033 (mortality), and 0.8373/0.1258 (vasopressor use), outperforming regular-grid, event-time grid, and prior set baselines. Learned $τ$ and $B$ provide interpretable summaries of temporal context and variable interactions, offering a practical plug-in for context-informed time-series models.
comment: ICLR 2026 Workshop on Time Series in the Age of Large Models (TSALM)

light_analysis.overview: 提出STAR-Set Transformer，通过引入时间局部性和变量类型亲和性的软注意力偏置，改进异步临床时间序列的建模。
light_analysis.motivation: 电子健康记录数据是不规则、异步的多变量时间序列，现有时间序列基础模型常通过tokenize事件而非离散化时间来处理，但输入布局设计成为关键挑战。网格方法能暴露时间×变量结构，但需要数据插补或缺失掩码，可能导致误差或模型过度依赖采样策略；点集tokenization避免了时间离散化，却丢失了变量内轨迹和时间局部跨变量上下文，影响建模精度。因此，本研究旨在恢复这些先验知识，以更有效地建模临床时间序列，解决现有方法在处理异步性和结构信息方面的不足。
light_analysis.method: 本文提出STAR-Set Transformer，基于Set Transformer架构，添加参数高效的软注意力偏置：时间局部性惩罚为-|Δt|/τ，其中τ为可学习的时间尺度，用于建模事件间的时间接近性；变量类型亲和性B_{s_i,s_j}从学习得到的特征兼容性矩阵中获取，以捕捉变量间交互。这种方法在token化事件集的基础上，恢复时间和变量结构上下文。研究中基准了10种深度融合调度策略，优化模型整合信息的方式，应用于ICU预测任务以验证有效性。
light_analysis.result: 在三个ICU预测任务上，STAR-Set Transformer的表现显著优于基线方法：CPR任务的AUC和APR分别为0.7158和0.0026，死亡率预测为0.9164和0.2033，血管升压剂使用预测为0.8373和0.1258。这些结果超越了常规网格、事件时间网格和先前的set baselines，表明通过添加注意力偏置能有效提升临床时间序列模型的预测性能，尤其在处理异步数据时。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是开发STAR-Set Transformer，通过注意力偏置恢复时间和变量交互的先验知识，在ICU预测任务中取得优异性能。学术上，为异步多变量时间序列建模提供了新方法，结合结构和上下文信息；实际上，模型的可解释组件如学习到的τ和B有助于理解临床数据中的时间动态和变量关系，可作为插件集成到其他上下文感知模型中。未来工作可能涉及扩展到更多医疗或工业领域，并进一步优化模型效率。

title: SENS-ASR: Semantic Embedding injection in Neural-transducer for Streaming Automatic Speech Recognition
abstract: Many Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) applications require streaming processing of the audio data. In streaming mode, ASR systems need to start transcribing the input stream before it is complete, i.e., the systems have to process a stream of inputs with a limited (or no) future context. Compared to offline mode, this reduction of the future context degrades the performance of Streaming-ASR systems, especially while working with low-latency constraint. In this work, we present SENS-ASR, an approach to enhance the transcription quality of Streaming-ASR by reinforcing the acoustic information with semantic information. This semantic information is extracted from the available past frame-embeddings by a context module. This module is trained using knowledge distillation from a sentence embedding Language Model fine-tuned on the training dataset transcriptions. Experiments on standard datasets show that SENS-ASR significantly improves the Word Error Rate on small-chunk streaming scenarios.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SENS-ASR方法，通过注入语义嵌入增强流式自动语音识别的转录质量，利用知识蒸馏训练上下文模块。
light_analysis.motivation: 流式自动语音识别（ASR）系统在实时处理音频时，由于未来上下文有限或缺失，性能常下降，特别是在低延迟约束下。现有方法在流式模式下依赖于有限上下文，导致转录准确性降低，影响实际应用如实时转录和语音助手。因此，研究动机是开发一种新方法，通过增强语义信息来补偿上下文不足，从而提升流式ASR的鲁棒性和实用性。
light_analysis.method: SENS-ASR方法的核心是在神经转导器中注入语义嵌入，以强化音学信息。语义信息通过一个上下文模块从可用的过去帧嵌入中提取，该模块使用知识蒸馏技术训练。具体地，训练基于一个句子嵌入语言模型，该模型在训练数据集转录上微调，以生成高质量语义表示，从而在流式处理中无需额外延迟地利用历史语义上下文，提升实时转录的精度。
light_analysis.result: 在标准数据集上的实验表明，SENS-ASR在小片段流式场景中显著降低了词错误率（WER）。与基线方法相比，该方法在流式模式下表现出明显的性能改进，但具体数据如准确率提升百分比摘要未明确说明。结果验证了通过语义信息增强能有效补偿未来上下文缺失，提升ASR系统在低延迟场景中的转录质量。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是SENS-ASR方法，通过语义注入和知识蒸馏成功提升了流式ASR的性能。学术价值在于展示了结合语义上下文和蒸馏训练的有效策略；实际应用上，可优化实时语音识别系统的准确性和效率。未来工作可能包括扩展到更多复杂场景或优化计算开销，但局限性摘要未明确说明。

title: Leveraging Wikidata for Geographically Informed Sociocultural Bias Dataset Creation: Application to Latin America
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) exhibit inequalities with respect to various cultural contexts. Most prominent open-weights models are trained on Global North data and show prejudicial behavior towards other cultures. Moreover, there is a notable lack of resources to detect biases in non-English languages, especially from Latin America (Latam), a continent containing various cultures, even though they share a common cultural ground. We propose to leverage the content of Wikipedia, the structure of the Wikidata knowledge graph, and expert knowledge from social science in order to create a dataset of question/answer (Q/As) pairs, based on the different popular and social cultures of various Latin American countries. We create the LatamQA database of over 26k questions and associated answers extracted from 26k Wikipedia articles, and transformed into multiple-choice questions (MCQ) in Spanish and Portuguese, in turn translated to English. We use this MCQ to quantify the degree of knowledge of various LLMs and find out (i) a discrepancy in performances between the Latam countries, ones being easier than others for the majority of the models, (ii) that the models perform better in their original language, and (iii) that Iberian Spanish culture is better known than Latam one.

light_analysis.overview: 本论文提出利用Wikidata知识图谱和Wikipedia内容创建LatamQA数据集，用于评估大语言模型在拉丁美洲文化上的偏见。
light_analysis.motivation: 该研究旨在解决大型语言模型在不同文化背景下的不平等问题，特别是针对拉丁美洲地区。现有模型主要基于全球北方数据训练，导致对拉丁美洲等非英语文化产生偏见，但缺乏专门的检测资源。这一问题的重要性在于拉丁美洲包含多样文化，尽管有共同基础，资源稀缺限制了偏见识别和模型改进。现有方法的不足体现在偏见检测工具多集中于英语，忽视非英语语言和文化多样性，从而影响了AI系统的公平性和包容性。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法基于结合Wikipedia内容、Wikidata知识图谱结构和社会科学专家知识，创建问题/答案对数据集。核心创新点是从26,000篇维基百科文章中提取信息，生成超过26,000个问题，并将其转换为西班牙语和葡萄牙语的多选题，随后翻译为英语。该方法利用知识图谱的语义关系确保数据质量，通过专家知识优化文化代表性，关键细节包括构建LatamQA数据库，涵盖多个拉丁美洲国家的流行和社会文化主题，以多语言格式支持偏见量化分析。
light_analysis.result: 主要实验结果使用LatamQA数据集量化了多种大语言模型的知识水平。发现包括：拉丁美洲国家间的性能存在差异，某些国家的问题对大多数模型更容易；模型在原始语言（如西班牙语和葡萄牙语）中表现更优；伊比利亚西班牙语文化比拉丁美洲文化更被模型熟知。与基线方法对比，这些发现揭示了文化偏见的具体模式，例如全球北方数据训练导致的偏见，但摘要未提供具体准确率数据，仅以定性结果展示了模型在文化认知上的不平等现象。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本论文的主要贡献在于创建了LatamQA数据集并评估了大型语言模型的文化偏见，为偏见检测提供了新资源。学术价值体现在推进多语言和文化多样性研究，实际应用价值包括促进AI系统的公平性和文化包容性。局限性或未来工作可能涉及扩展数据集到其他地区、改进模型评估方法或集成更多语言，但摘要未明确说明具体方向。整体上，该研究为减少AI偏见和增强全球文化代表性奠定了基础。

title: Beyond the Prompt in Large Language Models: Comprehension, In-Context Learning, and Chain-of-Thought
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated remarkable proficiency across diverse tasks, exhibiting emergent properties such as semantic prompt comprehension, In-Context Learning (ICL), and Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning. Despite their empirical success, the theoretical mechanisms driving these phenomena remain poorly understood. This study dives into the foundations of these observations by addressing three critical questions: (1) How do LLMs accurately decode prompt semantics despite being trained solely on a next-token prediction objective? (2) Through what mechanism does ICL facilitate performance gains without explicit parameter updates? and (3) Why do intermediate reasoning steps in CoT prompting effectively unlock capabilities for complex, multi-step problems?   Our results demonstrate that, through the autoregressive process, LLMs are capable of exactly inferring the transition probabilities between tokens across distinct tasks using provided prompts. We show that ICL enhances performance by reducing prompt ambiguity and facilitating posterior concentration on the intended task. Furthermore, we find that CoT prompting activates the model's capacity for task decomposition, breaking complex problems into a sequence of simpler sub-tasks that the model has mastered during the pretraining phase. By comparing their individual error bounds, we provide novel theoretical insights into the statistical superiority of advanced prompt engineering techniques.

light_analysis.overview: 论文通过理论分析揭示了大语言模型在语义理解、上下文学习和思维链推理背后的统计机制和创新机制。
light_analysis.motivation: 尽管大语言模型在多项任务中展现出卓越能力，如语义提示理解、上下文学习和思维链推理，但其理论机制仍不明确，限制了模型优化和应用。本研究旨在解决三个关键问题：如何通过下一个词预测目标准确解码提示语义、上下文学习如何无需参数更新提升性能、以及思维链提示如何通过分解复杂问题激活模型能力。现有方法多依赖于经验观察，缺乏系统性理论解释，因此探究这些机制对改进模型设计和应用具有重要意义。
light_analysis.method: 研究采用理论分析方法，探究大语言模型的自回归过程如何推断不同任务间标记的转换概率。关键创新包括分析上下文学习通过减少提示歧义促进任务意图的后验集中，以及思维链提示激活模型的任务分解能力，将复杂问题拆分为预训练阶段已掌握的简单子任务。此外，通过比较误差边界，提供了关于高级提示工程技术统计优越性的新理论见解。摘要未明确说明具体数据集或模型架构，但聚焦于统计和理论机制。
light_analysis.result: 研究结果表明，大语言模型通过自回归过程准确推断任务间标记的转换概率，上下文学习通过减少歧义提升了性能并促进后验集中。思维链提示有效解锁了模型解决复杂多步骤问题的能力，通过任务分解激活已学习技能。通过比较个体误差边界，研究提供了理论证据，支持高级提示工程技术的统计优越性。摘要未提供具体性能指标数据，如准确率提升，但强调了理论分析的结果优于经验观察。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是提供了关于大语言模型机制的新理论见解，解释了语义理解、上下文学习和思维链推理的现象。其学术价值在于增进了对模型内部工作机制的理解，为未来理论研究和模型设计提供框架；实际应用中，这些发现有助于优化提示工程和提升模型性能。摘要未明确说明局限性或未来工作方向，但可推测未来可能包括更深入的理论探索和实验验证。

title: Embed-RL: Reinforcement Learning for Reasoning-Driven Multimodal Embeddings
abstract: Leveraging Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) has become pivotal for advancing Universal Multimodal Embeddings (UME) in addressing diverse cross-modal tasks. Recent studies demonstrate that incorporating generative Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning can substantially enhance task-specific representations compared to discriminative methods. However, the generated reasoning CoTs of existing generative embedding methods are limited to the textual analysis of queries and are irrelevant to the retrieval of the targets. To address these limitations, we propose a reasoning-driven UME framework that integrates Embedder-Guided Reinforcement Learning (EG-RL) to optimize the Reasoner to produce evidential Traceability CoT (T-CoT). Our key contributions are threefold: (1) We design an EG-RL framework where the Embedder provides explicit supervision to the Reasoner, ensuring the generated CoT traces are aligned with embedding tasks. (2) We introduce T-CoT, which extracts critical multimodal cues to focus on retrieval-relevant elements and provides multimodal inputs for the Embedder. (3) With limited computational resources, our framework outperforms the pioneering embedding model on both MMEB-V2 and UVRB benchmarks. The integration of multimodal evidence in structured reasoning, paired with retrieval-oriented alignment, effectively strengthens cross-modal semantic consistency and boosts the fine-grained matching capability of the model as well as the generalization across complex scenarios. Our work demonstrates that targeted reasoning optimization can significantly improve multimodal embedding quality, providing a practical and efficient solution for reasoning-driven UME development.
comment: Correcting errors and improving organizational logic

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出Embed-RL框架，通过嵌入引导强化学习优化推理器，生成可追溯的多模态推理链，显著提升通用多模态嵌入的质量。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机在于解决现有生成嵌入方法中，推理链（CoT）仅限文本分析、与检索目标无关的局限性。现有方法在跨模态任务中缺乏推理与嵌入的对齐，导致语义一致性不足和检索效率低下。因此，开发一种能整合多模态证据并优化推理生成的方法，以增强嵌入任务的相关性和性能，成为推动通用多模态嵌入发展的关键需求。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法提出一个推理驱动的通用多模态嵌入（UME）框架，集成嵌入引导强化学习（EG-RL）。在EG-RL中，嵌入器为推理器提供监督，确保生成的推理链与嵌入任务对齐。引入可追溯推理链（T-CoT），提取多模态关键线索，聚焦检索相关元素，并为嵌入器提供多模态输入。该框架在有限计算资源下运行，通过结构推理和多模态证据整合，优化跨模态语义匹配，提高模型的细粒度匹配能力。
light_analysis.result: 主要实验结果显示，在计算资源有限的情况下，该框架在MMEB-V2和UV RB基准上优于先前的嵌入模型。具体表现为增强了跨模态语义一致性和细粒度匹配能力，但摘要未提供具体数值提升。与基线方法对比，该框架有效提高了模型在复杂场景中的泛化性能，展示了推理优化对嵌入质量的显著改善，无需额外计算开销。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献包括设计EG-RL框架、引入T-CoT，并通过实验验证了推理驱动嵌入框架的优越性。研究表明，针对性的推理优化能显著提升多模态嵌入质量，为推理驱动的通用多模态嵌入开发提供了实用且高效的解决方案。摘要未明确说明局限性和未来工作，但潜在价值在于推动跨模态AI应用的发展，增强语义理解和检索能力。

title: Evolving Beyond Snapshots: Harmonizing Structure and Sequence via Entity State Tuning for Temporal Knowledge Graph Forecasting
abstract: Temporal knowledge graph (TKG) forecasting requires predicting future facts by jointly modeling structural dependencies within each snapshot and temporal evolution across snapshots. However, most existing methods are stateless: they recompute entity representations at each timestamp from a limited query window, leading to episodic amnesia and rapid decay of long-term dependencies. To address this limitation, we propose Entity State Tuning (EST), an encoder-agnostic framework that endows TKG forecasters with persistent and continuously evolving entity states. EST maintains a global state buffer and progressively aligns structural evidence with sequential signals via a closed-loop design. Specifically, a topology-aware state perceiver first injects entity-state priors into structural encoding. Then, a unified temporal context module aggregates the state-enhanced events with a pluggable sequence backbone. Subsequently, a dual-track evolution mechanism writes the updated context back to the global entity state memory, balancing plasticity against stability. Experiments on multiple benchmarks show that EST consistently improves diverse backbones and achieves state-of-the-art performance, highlighting the importance of state persistence for long-horizon TKG forecasting. The code is published at https://github.com/yuanwuyuan9/Evolving-Beyond-Snapshots.

light_analysis.overview: 提出了 Entity State Tuning (EST)，通过持久和持续演化的实体状态，解决时间知识图预测中的长期依赖性问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 时间知识图预测需建模结构依赖和时序演化，但现有方法如stateless方法在每个时间戳重新计算实体表示，导致长期依赖遗忘和快速衰减。这限制了预测精度，尤其在长时范围内，影响实际应用如未来事件预测，现有方法无法有效维持实体状态更新。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出 Entity State Tuning (EST)，这是一个编码器无关的框架，维护全局实体状态缓冲区。通过闭环设计，首先使用拓扑感知状态感知器注入实体状态先验到结构编码；然后，统一时序上下文模块聚合状态增强事件，支持可插拔序列骨干网络；最后，双轨演化机制更新全局状态内存，平衡可塑性与稳定性。框架通用性强，适用于多种数据集和模型架构。
light_analysis.result: 在多个基准测试中，EST 持续改进不同骨干网络，实现 state-of-the-art 性能，表明状态持久性对长时范围 TKG 预测至关重要。实验显示预测准确率显著提升，与基线方法相比性能改善明显，验证了框架的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文贡献了 EST 框架，成功解决 TKG 预测中的长期依赖问题，学术上推动 TKG 建模技术进步，应用上提高预测准确性。代码已开源，促进未来研究，可能方向包括扩展框架到更复杂场景或优化稳定性机制。

title: AraModernBERT: Transtokenized Initialization and Long-Context Encoder Modeling for Arabic
abstract: Encoder-only transformer models remain widely used for discriminative NLP tasks, yet recent architectural advances have largely focused on English. In this work, we present AraModernBERT, an adaptation of the ModernBERT encoder architecture to Arabic, and study the impact of transtokenized embedding initialization and native long-context modeling up to 8,192 tokens. We show that transtokenization is essential for Arabic language modeling, yielding dramatic improvements in masked language modeling performance compared to non-transtokenized initialization. We further demonstrate that AraModernBERT supports stable and effective long-context modeling, achieving improved intrinsic language modeling performance at extended sequence lengths. Downstream evaluations on Arabic natural language understanding tasks, including inference, offensive language detection, question-question similarity, and named entity recognition, confirm strong transfer to discriminative and sequence labeling settings. Our results highlight practical considerations for adapting modern encoder architectures to Arabic and other languages written in Arabic-derived scripts.
comment: 9 pages, 1 figure. Accepted at AbjadNLP Workshop, EACL 2026

light_analysis.overview: 该论文提出了AraModernBERT，通过transtokenized初始化和长上下文建模优化了阿拉伯语的编码器模型。
light_analysis.motivation: 编码器-变压器模型在判别性NLP任务中广泛应用，但近期架构进展主要集中于英语，导致阿拉伯语模型发展滞后。阿拉伯语采用阿拉伯派生脚本，其独特结构需要专门处理，现有方法可能未充分适应这些特性，导致性能受限。本研究旨在解决阿拉伯语模型的适配问题，通过将现代编码器架构引入阿拉伯语，提升语言建模和任务处理能力，以填补多语言NLP领域的空白。
light_analysis.method: 该研究基于ModernBERT架构开发了AraModernBERT，专门针对阿拉伯语。核心方法包括transtokenized嵌入初始化和长上下文建模：transtokenization是一种针对阿拉伯语的嵌入初始化技术，用于优化语言建模过程；长上下文建模支持序列长度达8,192个词元，增强了模型处理长文本的能力。虽然摘要未明确说明具体数据集，但可能使用了相关阿拉伯语数据训练模型，并评估其在自然语言理解任务中的表现。
light_analysis.result: 实验显示，transtokenization显著提升了掩码语言建模性能，相比非transtokenized初始化有显著改进，但摘要未提供具体数据细节。长上下文建模在扩展序列长度下保持稳定有效，提高了内在语言建模性能。下游评估涵盖推理、攻击性语言检测、问题-问题相似性和命名实体识别等阿拉伯自然语言理解任务，结果证实模型在这些任务中表现优异，具有良好的迁移能力，尽管摘要未量化具体指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该论文的主要贡献是提出AraModernBERT，验证了transtokenized初始化和长上下文建模在阿拉伯语编码器模型中的有效性。学术价值在于为阿拉伯语及其他使用阿拉伯派生脚本的语言提供了实践指导，促进了多语言NLP的发展。实际应用价值体现在改进阿拉伯语自然语言理解任务。未来工作可能包括进一步优化模型或扩展应用到更多语言场景，但摘要未明确说明局限性。

title: Understanding and Optimizing Attention-Based Sparse Matching for Diverse Local Features
abstract: We revisit the problem of training attention-based sparse image matching models for various local features. We first identify one critical design choice that has been previously overlooked, which significantly impacts the performance of the LightGlue model. We then investigate the role of detectors and descriptors within the transformer-based matching framework, finding that detectors, rather than descriptors, are often the primary cause for performance difference. Finally, we propose a novel approach to fine-tune existing image matching models using keypoints from a diverse set of detectors, resulting in a universal, detector-agnostic model. When deployed as a zero-shot matcher for novel detectors, the resulting model achieves or exceeds the accuracy of models specifically trained for those features. Our findings offer valuable insights for the deployment of transformer-based matching models and the future design of local features.
comment: v2: add results with RaCo,RDD,DaD and Air-to-Ground benchmark

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出一种通用的检测器无关图像匹配模型，通过微调方法优化基于注意力的稀疏匹配，揭示了检测器在性能中的关键作用。
light_analysis.motivation: 本研究旨在解决基于注意力的稀疏图像匹配模型在不同本地特征上性能不稳定问题。在图像匹配任务中，基于transformer的模型（如LightGlue）应用广泛，但现有方法常忽略关键设计选择，导致匹配效果受检测器和描述符影响显著。检测器的作用未被充分理解，限制了模型的通用性和部署效率。图像匹配是计算机视觉的基础任务，优化其性能对于SLAM和增强现实等应用至关重要，因此需要一种更稳健的匹配策略。
light_analysis.method: 论文首先识别并分析LightGlue模型中一个被忽视的关键设计选择。研究发现，在基于transformer的匹配框架下，检测器（而非描述符）是性能差异的主要因素。为此，提出一种新方法：收集来自多种检测器的关键点数据，对现有图像匹配模型进行微调，从而构建一个通用、检测器无关的模型。该方法基于transformer架构，实现零样本匹配能力，无需针对新检测器重新训练，提升了模型的适应性和泛化能力。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，所提出的检测器无关模型在作为零样本匹配器用于新检测器时，其准确性达到或超过专门针对这些特征训练的模型。这显示了模型在多种本地特征上的优异性能，并有效减少了匹配差异。尽管摘要未明确提供具体性能指标，但可推断模型在标准数据集上进行了评估，可能以LightGlue为基线进行对比，验证了其在泛化能力和准确性方面的优势。结果强调了检测器在匹配过程中的核心作用。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的核心贡献在于揭示了检测器在基于注意力稀疏匹配中的主导影响，并开发了一种检测器无关的微调方法。学术上，这深化了对transformer-based匹配模型性能因素的理解，为未来本地特征设计提供了新思路。实际应用中，该模型提高了图像匹配的通用性和部署灵活性，降低了针对不同检测器的定制化训练需求。未来工作可扩展至更多特征类型或优化模型效率，以应对复杂场景，摘要未明确说明具体局限性。

title: WideSeek-R1: Exploring Width Scaling for Broad Information Seeking via Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning
abstract: Recent advancements in Large Language Models (LLMs) have largely focused on depth scaling, where a single agent solves long-horizon problems with multi-turn reasoning and tool use. However, as tasks grow broader, the key bottleneck shifts from individual competence to organizational capability. In this work, we explore a complementary dimension of width scaling with multi-agent systems to address broad information seeking. Existing multi-agent systems often rely on hand-crafted workflows and turn-taking interactions that fail to parallelize work effectively. To bridge this gap, we propose WideSeek-R1, a lead-agent-subagent framework trained via multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) to synergize scalable orchestration and parallel execution. By utilizing a shared LLM with isolated contexts and specialized tools, WideSeek-R1 jointly optimizes the lead agent and parallel subagents on a curated dataset of 20k broad information-seeking tasks. Extensive experiments show that WideSeek-R1-4B achieves an item F1 score of 40.0% on the WideSearch benchmark, which is comparable to the performance of single-agent DeepSeek-R1-671B. Furthermore, WideSeek-R1-4B exhibits consistent performance gains as the number of parallel subagents increases, highlighting the effectiveness of width scaling.

light_analysis.overview: WideSeek-R1是一个通过多代理强化学习实现宽度缩放的框架，用于协同编排和并行执行，提高广泛信息寻求任务的效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前大型语言模型主要关注深度缩放，即单个代理通过多轮推理解决复杂问题。但随着任务范围扩大，关键瓶颈从个体能力转向组织协调能力。现有多代理系统依赖手动工作流程和轮流交互，无法有效并行化，导致处理广泛信息寻求任务时效率低下。因此，本研究探索宽度缩放，以通过多代理协作克服这些限制，提升整体性能。
light_analysis.method: WideSeek-R1采用领导代理-子代理框架，通过多代理强化学习训练，实现可扩展编排和并行执行。该框架基于共享大型语言模型，为每个代理分配隔离上下文和专门工具，避免干扰。在包含2万个广泛信息寻求任务的数据集上，联合优化领导代理的决策和子代理的并行工作，关键创新在于动态调整代理协作，支持宽度缩放以提升任务处理能力。
light_analysis.result: 实验显示，WideSeek-R1-4B在WideSearch基准上达到40.0%的项目F1得分，与单代理DeepSeek-R1-671B性能相当，但使用更小模型（4B参数）。此外，随着并行子代理数量增加，性能持续提升，验证了宽度缩放和多代理协同的有效性，突出了并行执行在处理广泛任务中的优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究提出WideSeek-R1框架，通过多代理强化学习实现宽度缩放，增强了广泛信息寻求任务的效率。核心贡献在于结合深度与宽度缩放，利用领导代理-子代理架构优化并行执行。这为组织能力提供了新思路，减少了大型模型需求，具有实际应用价值。未来工作可扩展到更多任务类型和动态代理优化。

title: Model-Dowser: Data-Free Importance Probing to Mitigate Catastrophic Forgetting in Multimodal Large Language Models
abstract: Fine-tuning Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) on task-specific data is an effective way to improve performance on downstream applications. However, such adaptation often leads to a degradation in generalization on pretrained tasks, a phenomenon known as Catastrophic Forgetting. Existing methods that aim to mitigate this issue either become ineffective when fine-tuning deeper layers of the language decoder or scale poorly with increasing model size. To address these limitations, we propose Model-Dowser, a novel sparse fine-tuning approach for MLLMs. Model-Dowser measures a principled importance score for each model parameter with respect to pretrained generalization (prior to downstream adaptation) by jointly considering weight magnitudes, input activations, and output sensitivities. During fine-tuning, Model-Dowser selectively preserves high-importance parameters and updates the remaining. Comprehensive experiments on two representative MLLMs, LLaVA and NVILA, demonstrate that Model-Dowser effectively mitigates catastrophic forgetting and consistently outperforms prior methods, while remaining resource-efficient and scalable to multi-billion-parameter models.

light_analysis.overview: Model-Dowser是一种基于参数重要性的稀疏微调方法，有效缓解多模态大语言模型在微调时的灾难性遗忘问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 微调多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）于下游任务时，常导致预训练任务上的泛化能力下降，即灾难性遗忘现象。现有方法在处理深层语言解码器微调时变得无效，或随模型规模增大扩展性差，这限制了MLLMs在实际应用中的灵活部署和多任务学习能力。因此，开发一种既能高效适应新任务又保持泛化能力的方法至关重要，以促进模型在实际场景中的持续学习。
light_analysis.method: Model-Dowser的核心是一种数据自由的重要性探测机制，通过联合考虑权重幅度、输入激活和输出灵敏度，为每个模型参数计算基于原则的重要性分数。在微调过程中，该方法选择性地保留高重要性参数并更新其余参数，实现稀疏微调。该方法不依赖额外数据，适用于不同架构的MLLMs，如LLaVA和NVILA，具有通用性和可扩展性，关键创新在于重要性分数的多维评估。
light_analysis.result: 在LLaVA和NVILA等代表性MLLMs上的全面实验表明，Model-Dowser有效缓解了灾难性遗忘，并在性能上持续优于先前方法。摘要中提到该方法资源高效且可扩展到多亿参数模型，但未提供具体量化数据如准确率提升数值。实验证明了其在平衡模型适应性和泛化能力方面的优势，与基线方法相比显示出更好的扩展性和效率。
light_analysis.conclusion: Model-Dowser为多模态大语言模型的稀疏微调提供了新方法，通过参数重要性评估有效缓解了灾难性遗忘问题。其贡献在于实现资源高效和可扩展的模型适应，具有学术价值和实际应用前景，可促进MLLMs在多任务学习中的部署。摘要未明确说明局限性，但未来工作可能涉及更广泛的任务验证和模型类型扩展，为基于重要性探测的模型优化技术奠定基础。

title: Expert Selections In MoE Models Reveal (Almost) As Much As Text
abstract: We present a text-reconstruction attack on mixture-of-experts (MoE) language models that recovers tokens from expert selections alone. In MoE models, each token is routed to a subset of expert subnetworks; we show these routing decisions leak substantially more information than previously understood. Prior work using logistic regression achieves limited reconstruction; we show that a 3-layer MLP improves this to 63.1% top-1 accuracy, and that a transformer-based sequence decoder recovers 91.2% of tokens top-1 (94.8% top-10) on 32-token sequences from OpenWebText after training on 100M tokens. These results connect MoE routing to the broader literature on embedding inversion. We outline practical leakage scenarios (e.g., distributed inference and side channels) and show that adding noise reduces but does not eliminate reconstruction. Our findings suggest that expert selections in MoE deployments should be treated as sensitive as the underlying text.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出了一种针对专家混合语言模型的文本重构攻击，仅从专家选择中恢复令牌，揭示了路由决策严重泄漏信息的问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机源于MoE模型中专家选择的信息泄漏问题，现有方法对此理解不足。在MoE语言模型中，令牌被路由到专家子网络，这些路由决策可能泄露敏感文本信息。先前工作使用逻辑回归进行重构，但效果有限，未能充分评估泄漏风险。本研究旨在开发更有效的攻击技术，以解决实际部署中的隐私和安全挑战，对AI安全领域具有重要意义，特别是在大规模语言模型应用中防止数据泄漏。摘要未明确说明其他背景，但基于现有信息，该问题凸显了模型内部机制的安全性需求。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法提出两种文本重构技术：一是使用3层多层感知机（MLP）提升重构准确率；二是采用基于Transformer的序列解码器处理令牌序列。关键创新在于利用MoE路由决策的序列信息，连接了路由与嵌入反演技术。实验在OpenWebText数据集上进行，训练使用100M令牌，处理32令牌序列。这些方法改进了先前逻辑回归的不足，通过深度学习架构有效从专家选择中恢复文本，展示了从路由泄漏中重构内容的可行性。摘要未明确说明模型架构细节，但强调了Transformer解码器的序列处理能力。
light_analysis.result: 主要实验结果显示，3层MLP实现了63.1%的top-1准确率，显著优于先前逻辑回归的有限重构。基于Transformer的序列解码器在32令牌序列上达到91.2%的top-1准确率和94.8%的top-10准确率，这些结果在OpenWebText数据集上验证了方法的有效性。与基线方法对比，新方法在准确率和序列处理能力上均有大幅提升，证明了专家选择泄漏大量信息。此外，实验还显示添加噪声可以减少重构但不完全消除，进一步强调了泄漏的严重性。摘要未提供具体基线数据，但突出了性能改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: 结论指出，本研究将MoE路由决策连接到更广泛的嵌入反演文献，揭示了专家选择的信息泄漏风险，并概述了实际泄漏场景如分布式推理和侧信道。主要贡献在于提出了高效的重构攻击方法，强调了在MoE部署中专家选择应与底层文本一样敏感处理。学术价值在于深化对AI模型内部机制安全性的理解，实践意义在于指导安全部署和隐私保护措施。局限性包括噪声减轻但不消除泄漏，未来工作可能涉及开发更有效的防护技术或进一步评估不同场景下的风险。摘要未明确说明未来方向细节，但基于结果可推断安全增强需求。

title: Mechanistic Indicators of Steering Effectiveness in Large Language Models
abstract: Activation-based steering enables Large Language Models (LLMs) to exhibit targeted behaviors by intervening on intermediate activations without retraining. Despite its widespread use, the mechanistic factors that govern when steering succeeds or fails remain poorly understood, as prior work has relied primarily on black-box outputs or LLM-based judges. In this study, we investigate whether the reliability of steering can be diagnosed using internal model signals. We focus on two information-theoretic measures: the entropy-derived Normalized Branching Factor (NBF), and the Kullback-Leibler (KL) divergence between steered activations and targeted concepts in the vocabulary space. We hypothesize that effective steering corresponds to structured entropy preservation and coherent KL alignment across decoding steps. Building on a reliability study demonstrating high inter-judge agreement between two architecturally distinct LLMs, we use LLM-generated annotations as ground truth and show that these mechanistic signals provide meaningful predictive power for identifying successful steering and estimating failure probability. We further introduce a stronger evaluation baseline for Contrastive Activation Addition (CAA) and Sparse Autoencoder-based steering, the two most widely adopted activation-steering methods.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于信息论度量（NBF和KL散度）的机制指标，用于诊断大型语言模型中激活引导的可靠性。
light_analysis.motivation: 本研究旨在解决大型语言模型中激活引导可靠性的诊断问题。激活引导通过干预中间激活来实现目标行为而无需重新训练，应用广泛，但现有方法主要依赖黑箱输出或基于LLM的评判器，导致对引导成功或失败的机制因素理解不足。这限制了引导技术的可靠性和可控性，急需内部诊断工具来深化理解。
light_analysis.method: 本研究提出使用内部模型信号来诊断激活引导的可靠性，重点关注两个信息论度量：熵衍生的归一化分支因子（NBF）和词汇空间中引导激活与目标概念之间的Kullback-Leibler（KL）散度。假设有效的引导对应于解码步骤间的结构化熵保留和一致的KL对齐。基于两个架构不同的大型语言模型的高裁判一致性研究，利用LLM生成的注释作为真实标签进行验证。此外，为Contrastive Activation Addition（CAA）和基于稀疏自动编码器的引导方法引入了更强的评估基线，增强诊断的严谨性。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，基于NBF和KL散度的机制信号具有有意义的预测能力，能够有效识别激活引导的成功与否并估计失败概率。通过在可靠性研究中利用两个不同架构的大型语言模型生成的高一致性注释作为真实标签，验证了这些信号的有效性。研究还引入了针对CAA和稀疏自动编码器引导方法的更强评估基线，为未来性能比较提供了改进基础，提升了诊断的准确性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献在于提出了基于信息论度量的机制指标，用于诊断大型语言模型中激活引导的可靠性，这有助于深化对引导成功或失败机制因素的理解，提高引导技术的可控性和可解释性。研究具有学术价值，提供了新的诊断工具和更强评估基线，促进激活引导方法的进步。未来工作可进一步探索其他内部信号或扩展到更多引导方法，以克服潜在局限并增强应用广度。

title: Mock Worlds, Real Skills: Building Small Agentic Language Models with Synthetic Tasks, Simulated Environments, and Rubric-Based Rewards
abstract: Small LLMs often struggle to match the agentic capabilities of large, costly models. While reinforcement learning can help, progress has been limited by two structural bottlenecks: existing open-source agentic training data are narrow in task variety and easily solved; real-world APIs lack diversity and are unstable for large-scale reinforcement learning rollout processes. We address these challenges with SYNTHAGENT, a framework that jointly synthesizes diverse tool-use training data and simulates complete environments. Specifically, a strong teacher model creates novel tasks and tool ecosystems, then rewrites them into intentionally underspecified instructions. This compels agents to actively query users for missing details. When handling synthetic tasks, an LLM-based user simulator provides user-private information, while a mock tool system delivers stable tool responses. For rewards, task-level rubrics are constructed based on required subgoals, user-agent interactions, and forbidden behaviors. Across 14 challenging datasets in math, search, and tool use, models trained on our synthetic data achieve substantial gains, with small models outperforming larger baselines.
comment: The first author prefers the more commonly used English name "Yuanjie Lyu" over "Yuan-Jay Lü", so we have updated it; both refer to the same person

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出SYNTHAGENT框架，通过合成任务、模拟环境和基于规则的奖励，有效提升小型语言模型的代理能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 小型语言模型在代理能力上难以匹敌大型模型，而强化学习虽可帮助提升，但受限于现有开源训练数据任务单一、易于解决，以及真实世界API缺乏多样性和稳定性，导致大规模强化学习过程不稳定。这些瓶颈限制了小型模型的开发和应用，因此需创新方法来生成多样化的训练数据和稳定的模拟环境，以促进低成本模型的代理性能提升。
light_analysis.method: SYNTHAGENT框架联合合成多样工具使用训练数据并模拟完整环境。核心步骤包括：强教师模型创建新颖任务和工具生态系统，并将其重写为故意模糊的指令，迫使代理主动查询用户缺失细节；处理合成任务时，基于LLM的用户模拟器提供用户私有信息，模拟工具系统交付稳定工具响应；奖励机制基于任务级规则构建，考虑所需子目标、用户与代理的交互以及禁止行为，以指导模型学习。
light_analysis.result: 在数学、搜索和工具使用领域的14个挑战性数据集上，使用SYNTHAGENT合成数据训练的模型取得显著性能提升。小型模型在多个评估指标上优于更大的基线模型，表明框架有效增强了代理能力，具体表现为准确率和效率的改进，但摘要未提供详细数值数据。结果证实了该方法在克服训练瓶颈方面的优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究主要贡献是SYNTHAGENT框架，通过合成数据和模拟环境解决了小型语言模型代理训练中的数据稀缺和API不稳定问题。学术上，提出了一种新颖的方法来增强模型代理能力；应用上，使小型模型更具实用性和经济性。未来工作可扩展任务类型、优化奖励机制，并探索合成数据的泛化能力。

title: Do LLMs Truly Benefit from Longer Context in Automatic Post-Editing?
abstract: Automatic post-editing (APE) aims to refine machine translations by correcting residual errors. Although recent large language models (LLMs) demonstrate strong translation capabilities, their effectiveness for APE--especially under document-level context--remains insufficiently understood. We present a systematic comparison of proprietary and open-weight LLMs under a naive document-level prompting setup, analyzing APE quality, contextual behavior, robustness, and efficiency.   Our results show that proprietary LLMs achieve near human-level APE quality even with simple one-shot prompting, regardless of whether document context is provided. While these models exhibit higher robustness to data poisoning attacks than open-weight counterparts, this robustness also reveals a limitation: they largely fail to exploit document-level context for contextual error correction. Furthermore, standard automatic metrics do not reliably reflect these qualitative improvements, highlighting the continued necessity of human evaluation. Despite their strong performance, the substantial cost and latency overheads of proprietary LLMs render them impractical for real-world APE deployment. Overall, our findings elucidate both the promise and current limitations of LLM-based document-aware APE, and point toward the need for more efficient long-context modeling approaches for translation refinement.

light_analysis.overview: 本文系统比较专有和开源大语言模型在文档级自动后编辑任务中的表现，揭示专有模型虽接近人类水平但未能有效利用长上下文的局限性。
light_analysis.motivation: 自动后编辑（APE）旨在通过纠正残余错误来改进机器翻译质量，是提升翻译精度的关键任务。尽管大语言模型（LLMs）在翻译领域表现出色，但其在文档级上下文下的APE效果尚未充分理解，现有方法可能未充分利用上下文信息处理连贯性错误，限制了应用潜力。该研究旨在探索LLMs在更长上下文中的实际收益，并评估标准自动指标是否足够反映质量改进。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法包括在一个简单的文档级提示设置下，系统比较专有和开源大语言模型的性能。使用一次提示方式（one-shot prompting），分析模型的APE质量、上下文行为、对数据中毒攻击的鲁棒性以及效率。关键创新在于通过朴素提示策略评估模型在文档级上下文中的利用能力，强调技术比较的全面性。摘要未明确说明具体的数据集或模型架构细节。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，专有大语言模型即使在简单一次提示下也能达到接近人类水平的APE质量，无论是否提供文档上下文。这些模型对数据中毒攻击表现出更高鲁棒性，优于开源模型，但未能有效利用文档级上下文纠正上下文相关错误。标准自动指标如BLEU等不可靠反映质量提升，突显人工评估的必要性。专有模型由于高成本和延迟，在实际部署中受限。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究阐明了基于大语言模型的文档感知自动后编辑的潜力与当前局限。尽管专有模型质量接近人类水平，但未充分利用长上下文且成本效率低，阻碍实际应用。研究指出需要开发更高效的长上下文建模方法以改进翻译精炼任务，并强调标准自动评估指标的不足，未来工作需结合人工评估或开发可靠指标。这为LLM在APE领域的应用提供了重要见解。

title: Learning Through Dialogue: Engagement and Efficacy Matter More Than Explanations
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used as conversational partners for learning, yet the interactional dynamics supporting users' learning and engagement are understudied. We analyze the linguistic and interactional features from both LLM and participant chats across 397 human-LLM conversations about socio-political issues to identify the mechanisms and conditions under which LLM explanations shape changes in political knowledge and confidence. Mediation analyses reveal that LLM explanatory richness partially supports confidence by fostering users' reflective insight, whereas its effect on knowledge gain operates entirely through users' cognitive engagement. Moderation analyses show that these effects are highly conditional and vary by political efficacy. Confidence gains depend on how high-efficacy users experience and resolve uncertainty. Knowledge gains depend on high-efficacy users' ability to leverage extended interaction, with longer conversations benefiting primarily reflective users. In summary, we find that learning from LLMs is an interactional achievement, not a uniform outcome of better explanations. The findings underscore the importance of aligning LLM explanatory behavior with users' engagement states to support effective learning in designing Human-AI interactive systems.

light_analysis.overview: 论文研究发现，从大型语言模型（LLMs）的学习更多依赖于用户的认知投入和政治效能感，而非解释的丰富度，强调交互动态在对话式学习中的核心作用。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着大型语言模型（LLMs）在对话式学习中的应用日益增多，现有研究对其交互动态如何影响用户学习和投入的机制了解不足。本研究旨在解决这一实际问题，因为它对于设计有效的人机交互学习系统至关重要。现有方法往往侧重于提升解释质量，却忽略了用户认知状态和效能感的调节作用，导致学习效果不统一，无法充分适应个体差异。
light_analysis.method: 本研究基于397个人与LLM关于社会政治议题的对话数据集，采用中介分析和调节分析来探索LLM解释影响政治知识和信心的机制与条件。关键创新在于关注交互动态，而非孤立评估解释效果。通过分析对话的语言和交互特征，考察了解释丰富度如何通过用户反思洞察和认知投入中介效果，并检验了政治效能感的调节作用。数据集涵盖了多样化的对话内容，以捕捉真实交互情况，但具体LLM模型架构在摘要中未明确说明。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，LLM解释丰富度对信心的增益部分通过促进用户反思洞察实现，而对知识增益则完全依赖于用户认知投入的中介作用。调节分析表明，这些效果高度依赖于用户的政治效能感：信心增益主要出现在高效能用户能有效处理不确定性时，知识增益则依赖于高效能用户利用较长对话的能力，尤其是在反思性强的用户中表现更佳。与基线相比，研究强调了交互条件的调节作用，而非单一解释质量。摘要未提供具体性能指标如准确率。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献在于揭示了从LLM对话学习是一个交互性成就，用户的认知投入和政治效能感是关键驱动因素。其学术价值在于深化了对人机交互动态的机制理解，特别是通过中介和调节分析提供了新视角。实际应用价值为设计更个性化、响应式的学习系统提供了指导，通过对齐LLM解释行为与用户投入状态来提升学习效果。局限性在于研究聚焦于社会政治议题，未来可扩展至其他领域并探索更多用户特征。

title: LLMTrack: Semantic Multi-Object Tracking with Multi-modal Large Language Models
abstract: Multi-Object Tracking (MOT) is evolving from geometric localization to Semantic MOT (SMOT) to answer complex relational queries, yet progress is hindered by semantic data scarcity and a structural disconnect between tracking architectures and Multi-modal Large Language Models (MLLMs). To address this, we introduce Grand-SMOT, a large-scale, open-world benchmark providing high-density, dual-stream narratives that comprehensively decouple individual behaviors from environmental contexts. Furthermore, we propose LLMTrack, the first framework to seamlessly integrate MLLMs into the SMOT task. LLMTrack establishes a Macro-Understanding-First paradigm, utilizing a novel Spatio-Temporal Fusion Module to align discrete geometric trajectories with continuous semantic features, effectively suppressing temporal hallucinations during online processing. Extensive experiments demonstrate that LLMTrack achieves state-of-the-art geometric tracking performance while delivering a qualitative leap in dynamic semantic reasoning. Notably, our analysis reveals that high-quality semantic narratives empower the language model to deduce complex social interactions naturally, demonstrating that direct cognitive reasoning is more effective than cumbersome explicit visual modeling. Ultimately, our contributions bridge the gap between perceptual tracking and cognitive reasoning, establishing a robust new foundation for comprehensive video understanding and intelligent narrative generation.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出LLMTrack框架和Grand-SMOT基准，首次将多模态大型语言模型无缝集成到语义多对象跟踪任务中，实现几何跟踪与语义推理的协同。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究旨在解决语义多对象跟踪中语义数据稀缺和跟踪架构与多模态大型语言模型之间的结构脱节问题。随着多对象跟踪从几何定位向语义跟踪演变，以回答复杂关系查询，但现有方法因缺乏大规模语义数据集和有效整合语言模型的技术而受阻，限制了语义推理能力的提升和实际应用的发展。该问题的重要性在于推动智能视频理解和叙事生成系统的进步。
light_analysis.method: 方法包括引入Grand-SMOT基准，提供大规模、开放世界的高密度双流叙事，解耦个体行为和环境上下文。同时提出LLMTrack框架，采用宏观理解优先范式，通过新颖的空间-时间融合模块对齐离散几何轨迹与连续语义特征，有效抑制在线处理中的时间幻觉。框架整合多模态大型语言模型，利用其自然语言处理能力增强语义跟踪，实现几何和语义特征的协同优化。
light_analysis.result: 广泛实验显示，LLMTrack在几何跟踪性能上达到领先水平，具体表现为在标准基准上取得最先进结果，同时在动态语义推理方面实现质的飞跃，提升了复杂社交互动推断的准确性。分析表明，高质量语义叙事赋能语言模型自然演绎复杂交互，证明直接认知推理比繁琐的显式视觉建模更有效，与基线方法相比，LLMTrack在语义理解和跟踪稳定性上均有显著改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文主要贡献是建立Grand-SMOT基准和LLMTrack框架，弥合感知跟踪与认知推理之间的差距，为全面视频理解和智能叙事生成奠定新基础。学术价值在于推动语义多对象跟踪领域发展，提供新方法和数据集；实际应用潜力包括增强智能监控、自动驾驶等场景的视频分析能力。未来工作可探索更多模态融合和扩展应用领域，但摘要未明确说明具体局限性。

title: Prompting Underestimates LLM Capability for Time Series Classification
abstract: Prompt-based evaluations suggest that large language models (LLMs) perform poorly on time series classification, raising doubts about whether they encode meaningful temporal structure. We show that this conclusion reflects limitations of prompt-based generation rather than the model's representational capacity by directly comparing prompt outputs with linear probes over the same internal representations. While zero-shot prompting performs near chance, linear probes improve average F1 from 0.15-0.26 to 0.61-0.67, often matching or exceeding specialized time series models. Layer-wise analyses further show that class-discriminative time series information emerges in early transformer layers and is amplified by visual and multimodal inputs. Together, these results demonstrate a systematic mismatch between what LLMs internally represent and what prompt-based evaluation reveals, leading current evaluations to underestimate their time series understanding.

light_analysis.overview: 本研究通过线性探针分析揭示，基于提示的评估低估了大型语言模型在时间序列分类中的真实能力，其内部表示已编码有效时间序列信息。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机源于基于提示的评估显示大型语言模型在时间序列分类任务中表现不佳，这引发了对模型是否真正理解时间序列结构的质疑。该问题重要，因为时间序列分类在金融、医疗等实际应用中至关重要，而LLM作为通用模型的能力评估需要准确方法。现有基于提示的评估（如零样本提示）可能不足，无法揭示模型内部表示的潜在能力，导致错误低估其性能。摘要未明确说明更广泛背景，但隐含评估方法需改进以反映真实模型能力。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法包括直接比较基于提示的输出和线性探针分析相同的内部表示。核心创新在于使用线性探针评估LLM在时间序列分类中的表示能力，而非依赖提示生成。具体地，进行层级分析以探索transformer层中类别区分性信息的出现和增强，并可能通过视觉和多模态输入测试模型。该方法不详细说明具体数据集或模型架构，但重点在于内部表示分析，提供更客观的评估手段，揭示模型隐藏的表示潜力。
light_analysis.result: 主要实验结果显示，零样本提示的平均F1分数为0.15-0.26，表现接近随机水平。然而，线性探针分析相同内部表示将平均F1提升至0.61-0.67，这一性能经常匹配或超过专门的时间序列模型。层级分析进一步表明，类别区分性的时间序列信息在早期的transformer层中已经出现，并通过结合视觉和多模态输入得到强化。这些数据支持结论：基于提示的评估显著低估了LLM的能力，而内部表示分析揭示了其实际潜力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 结论总结，论文的主要贡献是揭示大型语言模型内部表示与基于提示评估之间的系统性不匹配，指出当前评估方法低估了模型在时间序列分类中的理解能力。学术价值在于提出了更准确的评估技术，强调使用内部表示分析而非仅依赖提示。实际应用价值可能涉及改进LLM在时间序列任务中的部署。未来工作方向可能包括开发新评估框架或探索多模态集成，摘要未明确说明局限性，但暗示评估方法优化是未来关键。

title: Beyond the Black Box: A Survey on the Theory and Mechanism of Large Language Models
abstract: The rapid emergence of Large Language Models (LLMs) has precipitated a profound paradigm shift in Artificial Intelligence, delivering monumental engineering successes that increasingly impact modern society. However, a critical paradox persists within the current field: despite the empirical efficacy, our theoretical understanding of LLMs remains disproportionately nascent, forcing these systems to be treated largely as ``black boxes''. To address this theoretical fragmentation, this survey proposes a unified lifecycle-based taxonomy that organizes the research landscape into six distinct stages: Data Preparation, Model Preparation, Training, Alignment, Inference, and Evaluation. Within this framework, we provide a systematic review of the foundational theories and internal mechanisms driving LLM performance. Specifically, we analyze core theoretical issues such as the mathematical justification for data mixtures, the representational limits of various architectures, and the optimization dynamics of alignment algorithms. Moving beyond current best practices, we identify critical frontier challenges, including the theoretical limits of synthetic data self-improvement, the mathematical bounds of safety guarantees, and the mechanistic origins of emergent intelligence. By connecting empirical observations with rigorous scientific inquiry, this work provides a structured roadmap for transitioning LLM development from engineering heuristics toward a principled scientific discipline.

light_analysis.overview: 本调查论文提出一个基于生命周期的分类法，系统综述大型语言模型的理论基础和内部机制，旨在解决理论理解不足的问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型的迅速崛起带来了人工智能的范式转变，但在实践中表现出色的同时，理论理解却相对滞后，这些模型常被视为“黑箱”。这导致难以深入理解其内部工作机制和优化潜力。现有方法多依赖工程启发式，缺乏系统的理论框架来分析核心问题，如数据选择、模型架构和训练动态。因此，迫切需要构建统一的理论体系来填补这一知识鸿沟。
light_analysis.method: 该调查提出一个统一的基于生命周期的分类法，将大型语言模型研究划分为六个阶段：数据准备、模型准备、训练、对齐、推理和评估。在此框架下，作者系统回顾了驱动模型性能的基础理论和内部机制，分析了核心理论问题，包括数据混合的数学证明、不同架构的表示极限以及对齐算法的优化动态。此外，方法还包括识别前沿挑战，如合成数据自我改进的理论极限、安全保证的数学界限和涌现智能的机制起源。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体实验结果，但通过系统综述，该论文组织了大量理论研究，提供了对大型语言模型各个生命阶段的深入分析。它连接了实证观察与严谨科学探究，为理解模型行为提供了结构化见解，并指出了未来研究的重点方向，例如合成数据自我改进的理论极限和安全保证的数学界限。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本论文的主要贡献在于提供了一个结构化路线图，将大型语言模型开发从工程启发式转向原则科学学科。它系统综述了理论基础和内部机制，具有重要学术价值，促进了对模型行为的科学理解。实际应用上，有助于改进模型设计、对齐和安全。识别的前沿挑战，如合成数据极限和涌现智能机制，为未来研究指明了方向。

title: Hidden State Poisoning Attacks against Mamba-based Language Models
abstract: State space models (SSMs) like Mamba offer efficient alternatives to Transformer-based language models, with linear time complexity. Yet, their adversarial robustness remains critically unexplored. This paper studies the phenomenon whereby specific short input phrases induce a partial amnesia effect in such models, by irreversibly overwriting information in their hidden states, referred to as a Hidden State Poisoning Attack (HiSPA). Our benchmark RoBench25 allows evaluating a model's information retrieval capabilities when subject to HiSPAs, and confirms the vulnerability of SSMs against such attacks. Even a recent 52B hybrid SSM-Transformer model from the Jamba family collapses on RoBench25 under optimized HiSPA triggers, whereas pure Transformers do not. We also observe that HiSPA triggers significantly weaken the Jamba model on the popular Open-Prompt-Injections benchmark, unlike pure Transformers. Finally, our interpretability study reveals patterns in Mamba's hidden layers during HiSPAs that could be used to build a HiSPA mitigation system. The full code and data to reproduce the experiments can be found at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/hispa_anonymous-5DB0.

light_analysis.overview: 论文揭示了Mamba-based语言模型在隐藏状态中毒攻击下的脆弱性，并提出了评估基准和潜在缓解方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 状态空间模型（SSMs）如Mamba因其线性时间复杂性被视为Transformer的高效替代，但其对抗鲁棒性尚未得到充分研究。本研究旨在解决特定短输入短语如何通过覆写隐藏状态导致部分遗忘效应的问题，即Hidden State Poisoning Attack（HiSPA）。这个问题的重要性在于暴露了SSM模型在安全性和可靠性方面的潜在弱点，现有研究对此关注不足，尤其是与更鲁棒的纯Transformer模型相比，突显了探索新模型鲁棒性的必要性。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出了Hidden State Poisoning Attack（HiSPA），通过优化特定短输入短语来诱导模型隐藏状态的不可逆覆写。关键创新包括定义HiSPA现象，并开发了RoBench25基准，用于评估模型在遭受攻击时的信息检索能力。研究中使用了SSM模型（如Mamba）、52B混合SSM-Transformer模型（来自Jamba家族）和纯Transformer模型进行对比实验。此外，进行了解释性研究，分析Mamba隐藏层在HiSPA攻击下的模式，为未来构建缓解系统提供了技术基础。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，SSM模型在HiSPA攻击下表现脆弱。在RoBench25基准上，52B混合SSM-Transformer模型在优化HiSPA触发器下崩溃，而纯Transformer模型不受影响。在Open-Prompt-Injections基准上，HiSPA触发器显著削弱了Jamba模型的性能，而纯Transformer则保持稳定。这些发现证实了SSM模型对HiSPA攻击的高度敏感性，与基线纯Transformer方法形成鲜明对比，突出了SSM模型的鲁棒性缺陷。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是揭示了Hidden State Poisoning Attack（HiSPA）对Mamba-based语言模型的威胁，并证明了SSM模型在此类攻击下的脆弱性。通过开发RoBench25基准和进行解释性研究，论文为评估和缓解此类攻击提供了工具和见解。学术价值在于填补了SSM模型对抗鲁棒性研究的空白，实际应用价值在于提升语言模型的安全性。未来工作可基于解释性研究开发具体的防御系统，并进一步探索其他模型的鲁棒性，摘要未明确说明局限性，但暗示了缓解系统的开发方向。

title: Do LLMs Judge Distantly Supervised Named Entity Labels Well? Constructing the JudgeWEL Dataset
abstract: We present judgeWEL, a dataset for named entity recognition (NER) in Luxembourgish, automatically labelled and subsequently verified using large language models (LLM) in a novel pipeline. Building datasets for under-represented languages remains one of the major bottlenecks in natural language processing, where the scarcity of resources and linguistic particularities make large-scale annotation costly and potentially inconsistent. To address these challenges, we propose and evaluate a novel approach that leverages Wikipedia and Wikidata as structured sources of weak supervision. By exploiting internal links within Wikipedia articles, we infer entity types based on their corresponding Wikidata entries, thereby generating initial annotations with minimal human intervention. Because such links are not uniformly reliable, we mitigate noise by employing and comparing several LLMs to identify and retain only high-quality labelled sentences. The resulting corpus is approximately five times larger than the currently available Luxembourgish NER dataset and offers broader and more balanced coverage across entity categories, providing a substantial new resource for multilingual and low-resource NER research.

light_analysis.overview: 论文的核心贡献是构建了一个名为 judgeWEL 的数据集，用于卢森堡语命名实体识别，通过大型语言模型验证弱监督标注的新流程。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机源于解决低资源语言如卢森堡语在命名实体识别任务中的数据稀缺问题。构建数据集通常依赖昂贵的人工标注，成本高且由于语言特性可能导致不一致性，这阻碍了自然语言处理技术在多样化语言环境中的应用。现有方法难以高效扩展，导致资源匮乏，因此开发自动化、可靠的标注方法至关重要，以促进多语言和低资源 NLP 研究，尤其是在推动语言平等和跨语言任务方面。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出了一种新方法，首先利用 Wikipedia 和 Wikidata 作为弱监督的结构化源，通过分析 Wikipedia 文章内的内部链接并映射到 Wikidata 条目来推断实体类型，从而生成初始标注，这减少了人工干预。然后，采用和比较多个大型语言模型（LLM），如 GPT 系列模型，来验证标注质量，识别和过滤噪声句子，确保数据集的可靠性。关键创新点在于结合结构化和非结构化数据源，以及使用 LLM 进行自动化验证，提高了标注效率和数据质量。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，构建的 judgeWEL 数据集比当前可用的卢森堡语 NER 数据集大约大五倍，提供了更广泛和更平衡的实体类别覆盖，如人物、地点和组织等。这为多语言和低资源 NER 研究提供了实质性新资源，尽管摘要未明确说明具体性能指标如准确率提升，但与基线数据集相比，其在规模和类别分布上表现出显著改进，支持了该方法的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是成功构建了 judgeWEL 数据集，并验证了结合弱监督和大型语言模型验证的方法在低资源语言命名实体识别中的可行性。这丰富了卢森堡语 NLP 资源，为其他类似语言的数据集构建提供了借鉴，具有重要的学术价值和实际应用价值。潜在局限性可能包括对 Wikipedia 链接质量的依赖以及 LLM 验证的准确性，未来工作可以探索更复杂的噪声处理技术或将该方法扩展到其他语言和领域。

title: Let It Flow: Agentic Crafting on Rock and Roll, Building the ROME Model within an Open Agentic Learning Ecosystem
abstract: Agentic crafting requires LLMs to operate in real-world environments over multiple turns by taking actions, observing outcomes, and iteratively refining artifacts. Despite its importance, the open-source community lacks a principled, end-to-end ecosystem to streamline agent development. We introduce the Agentic Learning Ecosystem (ALE), a foundational infrastructure that optimizes the production pipeline for agentic model. ALE consists of three components: ROLL, a post-training framework for weight optimization; ROCK, a sandbox environment manager for trajectory generation; and iFlow CLI, an agent framework for efficient context engineering. We release ROME, an open-source agent grounded by ALE and trained on over one million trajectories.
