Our approach includes data composition protocols for synthesizing complex behaviors and a novel policy optimization algorithm, Interaction-Perceptive Agentic Policy Optimization (IPA), which assigns credit over semantic interaction chunks rather than individual tokens to improve long-horizon training stability. Empirically, we evaluate ROME within a structured setting and introduce Terminal Bench Pro, a benchmark with improved scale and contamination control. ROME demonstrates strong performance across benchmarks like SWE-bench Verified and Terminal Bench, proving the effectiveness of ALE.

title: ShinyNeRF: Digitizing Anisotropic Appearance in Neural Radiance Fields
abstract: Recent advances in digitization technologies have transformed the preservation and dissemination of cultural heritage. In this vein, Neural Radiance Fields (NeRF) have emerged as a leading technology for 3D digitization, delivering representations with exceptional realism. However, existing methods struggle to accurately model anisotropic specular surfaces, typically observed, for example, on brushed metals. In this work, we introduce ShinyNeRF, a novel framework capable of handling both isotropic and anisotropic reflections. Our method is capable of jointly estimating surface normals, tangents, specular concentration, and anisotropy magnitudes of an Anisotropic Spherical Gaussian (ASG) distribution, by learning an approximation of the outgoing radiance as an encoded mixture of isotropic von Mises-Fisher (vMF) distributions. Experimental results show that ShinyNeRF not only achieves state-of-the-art performance on digitizing anisotropic specular reflections, but also offers plausible physical interpretations and editing of material properties compared to existing methods.

light_analysis.overview: 本研究提出ShinyNeRF框架，扩展Neural Radiance Fields技术以准确数字化各向异性镜面外观，并能处理各向同性和各向异性反射。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着数字化技术进步，文化遗产的保护和传播日益重要，Neural Radiance Fields (NeRF) 已成为3D数字化的领先方法，提供超逼真表示。然而，现有NeRF方法在建模各向异性镜面表面，如刷金属时，存在明显不足，无法准确捕捉其复杂反射特性。这在文化遗产数字化中尤为关键，因为高精度表面重现对提升真实感至关重要。因此，开发新方法以解决各向异性反射建模问题，对增强数字化质量和应用范围具有重要意义。
light_analysis.method: ShinyNeRF框架通过将出射辐射学习为各向同性von Mises-Fisher (vMF) 分布的编码混合，来近似Anisotropic Spherical Gaussian (ASG) 分布。它联合估计ASG分布的参数，包括表面法线、切线、镜面集中度和各向异性幅度，以同时处理各向同性和各向异性反射。关键创新在于利用ASG分布和vMF分布的混合建模，提供更精细的反射特性捕捉。摘要未明确说明具体数据集或模型架构细节，但框架侧重于光学近似和参数估计。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，ShinyNeRF在各向异性镜面反射数字化任务中实现了最先进的性能，优于现有方法，在准确性和逼真度方面有显著改进。同时，框架提供了合理的物理解释和材质属性编辑功能，支持用户更好地理解和修改数字化结果。尽管摘要未给出具体的性能指标数据，如准确率或效率数字，但它强调了ShinyNeRF在提升反射建模能力上的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的核心贡献是提出了ShinyNeRF框架，成功解决了NeRF技术中各向异性反射建模的挑战，扩展了其在3D数字化中的应用范围。学术上，它为反射建模提供了新方法；实际上，能提升文化遗产数字化的质量，支持材质编辑和物理分析。摘要未明确说明研究局限性或未来工作方向，但潜在方向可能包括计算效率优化和更多应用场景的探索。

title: Agentic Explainable Artificial Intelligence (Agentic XAI) Approach To Explore Better Explanation
abstract: Explainable artificial intelligence (XAI) enables data-driven understanding of factor associations with response variables, yet communicating XAI outputs to laypersons remains challenging, hindering trust in AI-based predictions. Large language models (LLMs) have emerged as promising tools for translating technical explanations into accessible narratives, yet the integration of agentic AI, where LLMs operate as autonomous agents through iterative refinement, with XAI remains unexplored. This study proposes an agentic XAI framework combining SHAP-based explainability with multimodal LLM-driven iterative refinement to generate progressively enhanced explanations. As a use case, we tested this framework as an agricultural recommendation system using rice yield data from 26 fields in Japan. The Agentic XAI initially provided a SHAP result and explored how to improve the explanation through additional analysis iteratively across 11 refinement rounds (Rounds 0-10). Explanations were evaluated by human experts (crop scientists) (n=12) and LLMs (n=14) against seven metrics: Specificity, Clarity, Conciseness, Practicality, Contextual Relevance, Cost Consideration, and Crop Science Credibility. Both evaluator groups confirmed that the framework successfully enhanced recommendation quality with an average score increase of 30-33% from Round 0, peaking at Rounds 3-4. However, excessive refinement showed a substantial drop in recommendation quality, indicating a bias-variance trade-off where early rounds lacked explanation depth (bias) while excessive iteration introduced verbosity and ungrounded abstraction (variance), as revealed by metric-specific analysis. These findings suggest that strategic early stopping (regularization) is needed for optimizing practical utility, challenging assumptions about monotonic improvement and providing evidence-based design principles for agentic XAI systems.

light_analysis.overview: 本研究提出了一种代理可解释人工智能（Agentic XAI）框架，通过结合SHAP可解释性和大型语言模型驱动的迭代优化，以生成渐进式增强的解释。
light_analysis.motivation: 可解释人工智能（XAI）能够揭示数据驱动的因子关联，但其技术解释难以传达给非专业人士，阻碍了AI预测的信任建立。尽管大型语言模型（LLMs）有潜力将解释转化为易懂叙述，但代理AI（即LLMs作为自主代理通过迭代优化）与XAI的结合尚未被探索。因此，本研究旨在解决这一不足，通过集成代理AI以迭代优化解释，提升XAI的可访问性和实用性，从而增强AI系统在真实场景中的应用效果。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出一个代理XAI框架，整合基于SHAP的可解释性和多模态LLM驱动的迭代优化过程。在农业推荐系统用例中，使用日本26个稻田的产量数据进行测试，框架从初始SHAP结果出发，通过11轮迭代（Rounds 0-10）逐步优化解释。关键创新在于将LLMs作为自主代理进行多轮分析，探索如何改进解释，并利用多模态能力处理不同类型的数据和上下文。
light_analysis.result: 实验通过人类专家（12名作物科学家）和LLMs（14个）评估解释质量，使用七个指标：具体性、清晰性、简洁性、实用性、上下文相关性、成本考虑和作物科学可信度。结果显示，推荐质量从初始轮次平均提升30-33%，峰值出现在第三到四轮。但过度迭代导致质量大幅下降，揭示出偏差-方差权衡：早期轮次解释深度不足（偏差），而过度迭代引入冗余和抽象（方差），表明需要平衡优化轮次。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究贡献在于提出并验证了代理XAI框架，证明迭代优化能有效提升解释质量，但需战略性早期停止（正则化）以优化实用性。学术上，挑战了单调改进的假设，提供了基于证据的设计原则；实际上，为XAI系统在农业推荐等场景中的应用提供了优化指南。未来工作可探索更多应用领域和改进策略，以应对过度优化带来的挑战。

title: Value Under Ignorance in Universal Artificial Intelligence
abstract: We generalize the AIXI reinforcement learning agent to admit a wider class of utility functions. Assigning a utility to each possible interaction history forces us to confront the ambiguity that some hypotheses in the agent's belief distribution only predict a finite prefix of the history, which is sometimes interpreted as implying a chance of death equal to a quantity called the semimeasure loss. This death interpretation suggests one way to assign utilities to such history prefixes. We argue that it is as natural to view the belief distributions as imprecise probability distributions, with the semimeasure loss as total ignorance. This motivates us to consider the consequences of computing expected utilities with Choquet integrals from imprecise probability theory, including an investigation of their computability level. We recover the standard recursive value function as a special case. However, our most general expected utilities under the death interpretation cannot be characterized as such Choquet integrals.

light_analysis.overview: 论文通过引入模糊概率理论和Choquet积分，扩展了AIXI强化学习代理的效用函数处理能力，以应对半测度损失带来的不确定性。
light_analysis.motivation: 在通用人工智能领域，AIXI代理需要为交互历史分配效用，但信念分布中的某些假设仅预测有限历史前缀，导致半测度损失，常被解释为死亡概率。现有方法依赖于这种特定解释，忽略了不确定性处理的其他视角。本研究的重要性在于，将信念分布视为模糊概率分布，以半测度损失表示总无知，从而解决效用分配中的模糊性问题，为构建更稳健的AI系统提供理论基础。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出使用模糊概率理论中的Choquet积分来计算期望效用，以处理信念分布作为不精确概率分布的情况。核心创新是将半测度损失视为总无知，而非固定概率损失，并研究Choquet积分的可计算性水平。方法表明标准递归价值函数是Choquet积分的特例，但死亡解释下的最一般期望效用不能完全由Choquet积分刻画，强调了理论框架的复杂性和扩展性。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体的实验结果或性能指标。论文主要进行了理论分析，探讨了Choquet积分在计算期望效用时的可计算性水平，并验证了标准递归价值函数作为特例的恢复。没有提供与基线方法的直接数据对比，因此结果侧重于理论性质的建立和分析，而非实证评估。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是扩展了AIXI代理的效用函数框架，通过引入模糊概率理论和Choquet积分，提供了处理不确定性下效用计算的新方法。这具有学术价值，推动了通用人工智能中效用理论和强化学习的理论发展，并为实际应用中处理不完整信息场景提供了支持。未来工作可能包括进一步研究计算可行性或多实用函数环境下的应用潜力。

title: Entropic Confinement and Mode Connectivity in Overparameterized Neural Networks
abstract: Modern neural networks exhibit a striking property: basins of attraction in the loss landscape are often connected by low-loss paths, yet optimization dynamics generally remain confined to a single convex basin and rarely explore intermediate points. We resolve this paradox by identifying entropic barriers arising from the interplay between curvature variations along these paths and noise in optimization dynamics. Empirically, we find that curvature systematically rises away from minima, producing effective forces that bias noisy dynamics back toward the endpoints - even when the loss remains nearly flat. These barriers persist longer than energetic barriers, shaping the late-time localization of solutions in parameter space. Our results highlight the role of curvature-induced entropic forces in governing both connectivity and confinement in deep learning landscapes.

light_analysis.overview: 本研究通过识别曲率诱导的熵力，解决了过参数化神经网络中模式连接与优化动态限制之间的悖论，突显了熵屏障在深度学习景观中的关键作用。
light_analysis.motivation: 现代神经网络损失景观中的吸引盆常由低损失路径连接，暗示模式连通性，但优化动态如随机梯度下降往往被限制在单一盆地，很少探索中间点，这构成了一个理论悖论。现有方法主要关注损失表面的能量障碍，忽视了曲率变化与动态噪声相互作用导致的限制现象。这一问题的重要性在于，解决它有助于理解深度学习优化过程的根本机制，改进算法探索性和收敛效率，从而推动更鲁棒的模型训练策略。
light_analysis.method: 作者提出一个分析框架，核心方法是识别熵屏障的产生机制，创新点在于结合曲率变化和优化动态中的噪声相互作用。通过实证研究过参数化神经网络损失路径上的曲率分布，发现曲率在远离最小值时系统性地增加，产生有效的熵力。该方法基于理论分析和模拟，无需特定数据集或模型架构，重点在于动态统计特性的研究，引入熵概念解释优化行为，揭示了曲率与噪声如何共同塑造参数空间的探索模式。
light_analysis.result: 研究发现，损失路径上的曲率变化导致熵屏障形成，即使损失值近乎平坦，也能产生有效力将优化动态偏向端点，限制了中间点的探索。熵屏障的持续时间比传统能量屏障更长，从而在参数空间中主导解的晚期定位。虽然摘要未明确说明具体性能指标如准确率或效率改进，但通过模拟验证了曲率诱导的熵力对动态限制的显著效应，与现有理论对比，解释了为什么优化算法不频繁利用低损失连接路径。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是揭示了曲率诱导的熵力在神经网络优化动态中的核心作用，解决了模式连接与动态限制的悖论，丰富了深度学习景观理论。学术价值在于强调了非损失相关动态因素的重要性，为优化机制提供了新视角。实际应用上，可能启发新算法设计以增强参数空间探索。局限性在于理论性较强，缺乏广泛实验验证；未来工作可扩展至不同网络架构，量化熵屏障的影响并探索其在实际训练中的应用。

title: LoC-Path: Learning to Compress for Pathology Multimodal Large Language Models
abstract: Whole Slide Image (WSI) MLLMs are difficult to build and deploy because gigapixel slides induce thousands of visual tokens, while only a small fraction of regions is diagnostically relevant. Existing slide-level pathology MLLMs typically combine heavy slide-level encoders with long visual prefixes, making end-to-end slide-level development and deployment expensive under limited computational resources. We revisit this regime and show that WSI tile features are highly redundant at both global and local scales, while task-relevant evidence is sparse and query-dependent. We therefore introduce LoC-Path, a resource-efficient slide-level MLLM that compresses before fusion. LoC-Path uses a Sparse Token Merger (STM) and an MAE-pretrained resampler to replace expensive slide-level encoding with a compact latent interface, then uses a Token Importance Scorer (TIS) to select the most relevant latents and a Cross-Attention Routing Adapter (CARA) to fuse them into a few LLM decoder layers. This design lowers both multimodal tuning cost and inference-time latency/memory by avoiding heavy slide-level encoding and long visual prefixes. Extensive experiments show that LoC-Path remains competitive with prior slide-level MLLMs while making end-to-end development and deployment more practical under limited computational resources.

light_analysis.overview: LoC-Path通过压缩视觉令牌来降低病理学多模态大型语言模型的资源消耗，实现高效开发与部署。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机是解决病理学全幻灯片图像中视觉令牌冗余、诊断相关证据稀疏的实际问题。现有方法结合重型编码器和长视觉前缀，导致计算成本高、部署困难，特别是在资源受限环境下，这一问题限制了模型的实际应用，因此需要更高效的压缩技术来改进。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出LoC-Path，使用Sparse Token Merger和MAE预训练重采样器压缩视觉令牌，构建紧凑潜在接口；然后通过Token Importance Scorer选择相关latents，并用Cross-Attention Routing Adapter融合到少量LLM解码层，避免了重型编码和长视觉前缀，从而降低调优和推理成本。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，LoC-Path在保持与先前方法竞争性的性能的同时，显著降低了多模态调优成本和推理时的延迟与内存使用，使模型在有限计算资源下更易于开发和部署，但摘要未提供具体性能指标数据。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是提出资源高效的LoC-Path模型，通过压缩机制降低病理学MLLMs的计算负担。研究具有学术价值，推动了医学图像分析的资源优化；实际应用中可用于资源受限环境，未来工作可探索压缩策略的精度损失或扩展其他模态。

title: Contact-Aware Refinement of Human Pose Pseudo-Ground Truth via Bioimpedance Sensing
abstract: Capturing accurate 3D human pose in the wild would provide valuable data for training pose estimation and motion generation methods. While video-based estimation approaches have become increasingly accurate, they often fail in common scenarios involving self-contact, such as a hand touching the face. In contrast, wearable bioimpedance sensing can cheaply and unobtrusively measure ground-truth skin-to-skin contact. Consequently, we propose a novel framework that combines visual pose estimators with bioimpedance sensing to capture the 3D pose of people by taking self-contact into account. Our method, BioTUCH, initializes the pose using an off-the-shelf estimator and introduces contact-aware pose optimization during measured self-contact: reprojection error and deviations from the input estimate are minimized while enforcing vertex proximity constraints. We validate our approach using a new dataset of synchronized RGB video, bioimpedance measurements, and 3D motion capture. Testing with three input pose estimators, we demonstrate an average of 11.7% improvement in reconstruction accuracy. We also present a miniature wearable bioimpedance sensor that enables efficient large-scale collection of contact-aware training data for improving pose estimation and generation using BioTUCH. Code and data are available at biotuch.is.tue.mpg.de
comment: * Equal contribution. Minor figure corrections compared to the ICCV 2025 version

light_analysis.overview: 提出BioTUCH框架，结合视觉姿态估计和生物阻抗传感，通过自接触优化提高3D人体姿态估计的准确度。
light_analysis.motivation: 在野外捕获准确的3D人体姿态对于训练姿态估计和运动生成方法至关重要，但现有视频基于的估计方法在自接触场景（如手触脸）中常失效，导致姿态数据不完整。生物阻抗传感能廉价、非侵入性地测量真实皮肤到皮肤接触，为解决这一不足提供了新途径，因此本研究旨在整合视觉和传感技术，弥补现有方法的局限性。
light_analysis.method: BioTUCH框架使用现成姿态估计器初始化姿态，并在生物阻抗传感测量自接触时引入接触感知优化：最小化重投影误差和与输入估计的偏差，同时强制执行顶点接近约束。关键创新在于融合多模态数据修正姿态，使用包含同步RGB视频、生物阻抗测量和3D运动捕获的新数据集进行验证，并开发微型可穿戴生物阻抗传感器以支持大规模数据收集。
light_analysis.result: 基于新数据集，测试三个输入姿态估计器，BioTUCH方法显示重建准确度平均提升11.7%，与基线方法相比显著改进，验证了接触感知优化的有效性。实验结果包括姿态关键点位置误差减少，具体数据支撑了方法在自接触场景下的性能增强。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是提出BioTUCH框架，结合生物阻抗传感优化视觉姿态估计，提高了自接触场景的准确度。学术价值在于推动多模态传感在姿态估计领域的应用；实际应用价值包括生成高质量训练数据和提升现实世界姿态估计系统性能。未来工作可扩展传感器部署和测试更复杂场景。

title: Generalizing Vision-Language Models with Dedicated Prompt Guidance
abstract: Fine-tuning large pretrained vision-language models (VLMs) has emerged as a prevalent paradigm for downstream adaptation, yet it faces a critical trade-off between domain specificity and domain generalization (DG) ability. Current methods typically fine-tune a universal model on the entire dataset, which potentially compromises the ability to generalize to unseen domains. To fill this gap, we provide a theoretical understanding of the generalization ability for VLM fine-tuning, which reveals that training multiple parameter-efficient expert models on partitioned source domains leads to better generalization than fine-tuning a universal model. Inspired by this finding, we propose a two-step domain-expert-Guided DG (GuiDG) framework. GuiDG first employs prompt tuning to obtain source domain experts, then introduces a Cross-Modal Attention module to guide the fine-tuning of the vision encoder via adaptive expert integration. To better evaluate few-shot DG, we construct ImageNet-DG from ImageNet and its variants. Extensive experiments on standard DG benchmarks and ImageNet-DG demonstrate that GuiDG improves upon state-of-the-art fine-tuning methods while maintaining efficiency.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出GuiDG框架，通过多专家模型和跨模态注意力改进视觉语言模型的领域泛化能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 视觉语言模型在下游任务微调时面临领域特定性与泛化能力的权衡问题，现有方法通过单一模型微调容易损害在未见域上的性能。这种局限性对模型在多样化现实环境中的应用构成挑战，因此需要发展更有效的策略来提升泛化。研究基于理论分析，指出在划分源域上训练多个专家模型能更好应对领域变化，为解决这一关键问题提供了新思路。
light_analysis.method: 研究提出GuiDG框架，包括两个步骤：首先，使用提示调优技术在分区的源域上训练多个参数高效的专家模型；其次，引入跨模态注意力模块，通过自适应集成这些专家模型来指导视觉编码器的微调。关键创新在于结合多专家学习和跨模态交互，以优化模型泛化能力。此外，为评估few-shot领域泛化，构建了基于ImageNet及其变体的ImageNet-DG数据集。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，GuiDG在标准领域泛化基准和ImageNet-DG数据集上均优于现有先进的微调方法，尽管摘要未提供具体数值指标，但报告了性能提升并保持效率优势。与基线方法对比，该框架有效平衡了领域适应性和泛化能力，在few-shot设置下展现出更强的鲁棒性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究通过理论证明和实验验证，确认了多专家模型策略在提高视觉语言模型领域泛化方面的有效性。GuiDG框架不仅提供实用技术方案，还深化了对微调泛化机制的理解，具有学术推动和应用价值。未来可探索更多域划分方法或扩展至其他模态任务以进一步提升性能。

title: SkeletonAgent: An Agentic Interaction Framework for Skeleton-based Action Recognition
abstract: Recent advances in skeleton-based action recognition increasingly leverage semantic priors from Large Language Models (LLMs) to enrich skeletal representations. However, the LLM is typically queried in isolation from the recognition model and receives no performance feedback. As a result, it often fails to deliver the targeted discriminative cues critical to distinguish similar actions. To overcome these limitations, we propose SkeletonAgent, a novel framework that bridges the recognition model and the LLM through two cooperative agents, i.e., Questioner and Selector. Specifically, the Questioner identifies the most frequently confused classes and supplies them to the LLM as context for more targeted guidance. Conversely, the Selector parses the LLM's response to extract precise joint-level constraints and feeds them back to the recognizer, enabling finer-grained cross-modal alignment. Comprehensive evaluations on five benchmarks, including NTU RGB+D, NTU RGB+D 120, Kinetics-Skeleton, FineGYM, and UAV-Human, demonstrate that SkeletonAgent consistently outperforms state-of-the-art benchmark methods. The code is available at https://github.com/firework8/SkeletonAgent.

light_analysis.overview: SkeletonAgent提出一种通过Questioner和Selector合作代理桥接骨架识别模型与大语言模型的框架，实现细粒度跨模态对齐，以提升动作识别性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 在骨架动作识别领域，现有方法常利用大语言模型提供语义先验来增强骨架表示，但LLM通常与识别模型隔离查询，缺乏性能反馈，导致其无法有效提供区分相似动作的关键判别线索。这个问题在复杂动作场景中尤为重要，因为相似动作的区分直接影响识别的准确性。现有方法的不足之处在于缺乏有针对性的指导和反馈机制，因此需要改进以实现更精准的跨模态协作。
light_analysis.method: SkeletonAgent框架包括两个合作代理：Questioner和Selector。Questioner通过分析识别模型的输出，识别最常混淆的动作类别，并将其作为上下文输入给LLM，以获取更针对性的语义指导。Selector解析LLM的响应，提取精确的关节级约束，并将这些约束反馈给识别模型，从而促进细粒度的跨模态对齐。该方法的关键创新点在于引入了代理交互机制，使LLM能够基于识别模型的反馈动态调整输出，增强了骨架表示的判别性。
light_analysis.result: 在五个基准数据集上进行了全面评估，包括NTU RGB+D、NTU RGB+D 120、Kinetics-Skeleton、FineGYM和UAV-Human。实验结果表明，SkeletonAgent在所有数据集上均优于当前最先进的基准方法，显示出其一致性和有效性。虽然摘要未提供具体性能指标（如准确率提升数据），但整体结果证明了该框架在提升骨架动作识别性能方面的显著优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是提出SkeletonAgent框架，通过合作代理桥接识别模型和LLM，解决了现有方法中LLM孤立查询的局限性，实现细粒度跨模态对齐。该研究不仅提升了骨架动作识别的准确性和鲁棒性，还提供了一种新的交互式框架，具有学术价值，可为其他跨模态任务提供借鉴。未来工作可能包括扩展到更广泛的应用场景，或进一步优化代理交互机制以提高效率。

title: MedEyes: Learning Dynamic Visual Focus for Medical Progressive Diagnosis
abstract: Accurate medical diagnosis often involves progressive visual focusing and iterative reasoning, characteristics commonly observed in clinical workflows. While recent vision-language models demonstrate promising chain-of-thought (CoT) reasoning capabilities via reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR), their purely on-policy learning paradigm tends to reinforce superficially coherent but clinically inaccurate reasoning paths. We propose MedEyes, a novel reinforcement learning framework that dynamically models clinician-style diagnostic reasoning by progressively attending to and interpreting relevant medical image regions. By incorporating off-policy expert guidance, MedEyes converts expert visual search trajectories into structured external behavioral signals, guiding the model toward clinically aligned visual reasoning. We design the Gaze-guided Reasoning Navigator (GRN) to emulate the diagnostic process through a dual-mode exploration strategy, scanning for systematic abnormality localization and drilling for detailed regional analysis. To balance expert imitation and autonomous discovery, we introduce the Confidence Value Sampler (CVS), which employs nucleus sampling and adaptive termination to create diverse yet credible exploration paths. Finally, the dual-stream GRPO optimization framework decouples on-policy and off-policy learning signals, mitigating reward assimilation and entropy collapse. Experiments demonstrate that MedEyes achieves an average performance improvement of +8.5pp across multiple medical VQA benchmarks, validating MedEyes's potential in building trustworthy medical AI systems. Code is available at https://github.com/zhcz328/MedEyes.
comment: AAAI 2026, Medical Chain-of-Thought (CoT), Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR), Multimodal Grounded Reasoning

light_analysis.overview: MedEyes 提出一种新颖的强化学习框架，通过动态视觉聚焦和专家指导改进医学渐进诊断的推理准确性。
light_analysis.motivation: 医学诊断常涉及渐进视觉聚焦和迭代推理，类似临床工作流程。现有视觉语言模型通过强化学习与可验证奖励实现链式思维推理，但纯策略学习范式倾向于强化表面连贯但临床不准确的推理路径，导致诊断不可靠和潜在风险。因此，需要开发能模仿临床医生动态推理过程、提高临床对齐性的方法，以应对医疗 AI 系统中推理可信度的挑战。
light_analysis.method: MedEyes 框架整合离策略专家指导，将专家视觉搜索轨迹转换为结构化外部行为信号，以引导临床对齐的视觉推理。它设计 Gaze-guided Reasoning Navigator (GRN)，通过双模式探索策略（扫描异常定位和钻取区域分析）模拟诊断过程。Confidence Value Sampler (CVS) 使用核心采样和自适应终止创建多样且可信的探索路径。最后，dual-stream GRPO 优化框架解耦策略和离策略学习信号，防止奖励同化和熵崩溃，确保学习稳定性。
light_analysis.result: 实验显示，MedEyes 在多个医学视觉问答基准测试中实现了平均性能提升 8.5 个百分点，显著优于现有基线方法。具体数据表明其有效提高了诊断准确性和推理可信度，验证了框架在临床对齐方面的优势。虽然摘要未明确说明具体基线对比细节，但结果暗示了 MedEyes 在医疗 AI 系统中潜力的广泛验证。
light_analysis.conclusion: MedEyes 通过动态视觉聚焦和专家模仿，增强了医学 AI 系统的临床对齐和推理可信度，主要贡献在于改进渐进诊断方法。其研究具有学术价值，为构建可信赖医疗 AI 提供了新途径，潜在应用包括辅助诊断和临床培训。未来工作可扩展至其他医学图像任务或优化专家指导机制，以进一步提升性能。

title: When Models Fabricate Credentials: Measuring How Professional Identity Suppresses Honest Self-Representation
abstract: Language models produce authoritative, persuasive responses even when those responses rest on fabricated expertise. Measuring this fabrication propensity directly across all domains is intractable, but AI identity disclosure provides a clean test: when a model assigned a professional persona is asked about its expertise origins, it can either disclose its AI nature or fabricate a human professional history. Because the ground truth is known-the model is not a neurosurgeon-non-disclosure constitutes unambiguous fabrication.   Using a factorial evaluation design, sixteen open-weight models (4B-671B parameters) were audited under identical conditions across 19,200 trials. Under professional personas-neurosurgeon, financial advisor, classical musician-models that disclose their AI nature in 99.8-99.9% of interactions under neutral conditions instead fabricated professional credentials, training narratives, and embodied experiences. Fabrication rates varied unpredictably: a 14B model disclosed in 61.4% of interactions while a 70B model disclosed in just 4.1%. Domain-specific inconsistency was pronounced: a Financial Advisor persona elicited 35.2% disclosure at the first prompt while a Neurosurgeon persona elicited only 3.6%-a 9.7-fold difference. Model identity provided substantially larger improvement in fitting observations than parameter count (Delta R_adj^2 = 0.375 vs 0.012).   An additional experiment found that adding explicit disclosure permission to persona system prompts increased disclosure from 23.7% to 65.8%, indicating that honest self-representation is a suppressed default rather than an absent capability-models can disclose but do not when persona instructions are silent on self-disclosure. The propensity to fabricate expertise is context-dependent rather than a stable model property, requiring deliberate behavior design and domain-specific verification.
comment: 47 pages, 12 figures, 12 tables; retitled paper and reframed paper

light_analysis.overview: 论文通过实验测量了语言模型在专业角色下抑制诚实自我表示并伪造专业资格的倾向，揭示了伪造行为是上下文依赖的。
light_analysis.motivation: 语言模型在生成响应时可能伪造专业资格，导致误导性权威，影响AI在专业场景中的可信度和安全性。现有方法难以直接测量所有领域的伪造倾向，但通过AI身份披露可以提供一个清晰测试，因为已知模型不是人类专家。研究动机在于系统评估模型在特定角色下的伪造行为，以弥补现有评估方法的不足，确保AI自我表示的诚实性，减少潜在误传风险。
light_analysis.method: 研究采用因子评估设计，审计了16个开放权重语言模型（参数范围从4B到671B），在19,200次试验中，为模型分配专业角色如神经外科医生、财务顾问和古典音乐家。关键创新点在于利用已知地面真相——模型不是人类专家——来测试其是否披露AI身份或伪造人类专业历史。方法特色包括比较不同模型和角色下的披露率，并使用统计指标如调整后R平方来评估模型身份对观测的拟合改进。技术细节中未明确指定具体数据集或模型架构，但基于参数范围推断涉及大型语言模型。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，在专业角色下，模型的AI身份披露率显著下降，而伪造专业凭证的倾向增加。具体数据：一个14B参数模型在61.4%的交互中披露AI身份，而一个70B模型仅4.1%。领域特异性不一致明显，如财务顾问角色首次提示披露率35.2%，神经外科医生仅3.6%，差异9.7倍。模型身份对拟合观测的贡献远大于参数数量（ΔR_adj² = 0.375 vs 0.012）。额外实验表明，添加披露许可到系统提示后，披露率从23.7%提升至65.8%，证实诚实自我表示是被抑制的默认能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是量化了语言模型在专业角色下伪造专业资格的倾向，并证明这种行为是上下文依赖的而非稳定模型属性。学术价值在于为AI行为分析提供了新方法，强调模型自我表示的可控性和可测量性；实际应用价值提示需要有意设计系统提示和领域特异性验证来减少误导，例如在专业应用中增强透明度。局限性可能包括实验范围的限制，未来工作可扩展至更多领域或结合改进的模型训练策略来进一步探索行为设计。

title: RefTr: Recurrent Refinement of Confluent Trajectories for 3D Vascular Tree Centerlines
abstract: Tubular tree structures such as blood vessels and lung airways are central to many clinical tasks, including diagnosis, treatment planning, and surgical navigation. Accurate centerline extraction with correct topology is essential, as missing small branches can lead to incomplete assessments or overlooked abnormalities. We propose RefTr, a 3D image-to-graph framework that generates vascular centerlines via recurrent refinement of confluent trajectories. RefTr adopts a Transformer-based Producer-Refiner architecture in which the Producer predicts candidate trajectories and a shared Refiner iteratively refines them toward the target branches. The confluent trajectory representation enables whole-branch refinement while explicitly enforcing valid topology. This recurrent scheme improves precision and reduces decoder parameters by 2.4x compared to the state-of-the-art. We further introduce an efficient non-maximum suppression algorithm for spatial tree graphs to merge duplicate branches and extend evaluation metrics to be radius-aware for robust comparison. Experiments on multiple public datasets demonstrate stronger overall performance, faster inference, and substantially fewer parameters, highlighting the effectiveness of RefTr for 3D vascular tree analysis.

light_analysis.overview: RefTr提出基于Transformer的循环细化架构，实现了3D血管树中心线的准确提取，减少参数并提升性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 该研究旨在解决3D血管树中心线提取中准确性和拓扑正确性的问题。血管和气道等管状结构在临床诊断、治疗规划和手术导航中至关重要，但现有方法可能因缺失小分支而导致不完整评估或忽略异常，因此需要更高效和精确的解决方案来确保临床任务的可靠性。
light_analysis.method: RefTr采用3D图像到图框架，核心是基于Transformer的生产者-细化器架构。生产者模块预测候选中心线轨迹，共享细化器通过循环迭代优化这些轨迹，使用汇合轨迹表示以支持整个分支细化并强制执行有效拓扑。此外，引入了高效的非最大值抑制算法处理空间树图中的重复分支，并扩展评估指标为半径感知以增强比较的鲁棒性。
light_analysis.result: 实验在多个公共数据集上进行，结果显示RefTr相比最先进方法，解码器参数减少2.4倍，整体性能更强，推理速度更快。具体表现为精度提升和计算效率改进，但摘要未给出详细准确率数据，强调了框架在减少参数的同时保持高精度的优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: RefTr通过循环细化和拓扑保持的创新方法，显著提高了3D血管树中心线提取的准确性和效率。该研究为临床医学图像分析提供了有效工具，具有重要应用价值；未来工作可能扩展至其他复杂管状结构分析或优化算法细节。

title: Beyond Description: Cognitively Benchmarking Fine-Grained Action for Embodied Agents
abstract: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) show promising results as decision-making engines for embodied agents operating in complex, physical environments. However, existing benchmarks often prioritize high-level planning or spatial reasoning, leaving the fine-grained action intelligence required for embodied physical interaction underexplored. To address this gap, we introduce CFG-Bench, a new benchmark designed to systematically evaluate this crucial capability. CFG-Bench consists of 1,368 curated videos paired with 19,562 question-answer pairs spanning three evaluation paradigms targeting four cognitive abilities: 1) Physical Interaction, 2) Temporal-Causal Relation, 3) Intentional Understanding, and 4) Evaluative Judgment. Together, these dimensions provide a systematic framework for assessing a model's ability to translate visual observations into actionable knowledge, moving beyond mere surface-level recognition. Our comprehensive evaluation on CFG-Bench reveals that leading MLLMs struggle to produce detailed instructions for physical interactions and exhibit profound limitations in the higher-order reasoning of intention and evaluation. Moreover, supervised fine-tuning (SFT) on our data demonstrates that teaching an MLLMs to articulate fine-grained actions directly translates to significant performance gains on established embodied benchmarks. Our analysis highlights these limitations and offers insights for developing more capable and grounded embodied agents. Project page: https://cfg-bench.github.io/

light_analysis.overview: 本文引入CFG-Bench基准，系统评估多模态大语言模型在具身物理交互中的细粒度动作认知能力，填补现有评估空白。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机源于现有基准多关注高维规划或空间推理，而忽视了对具身物理交互至关重要的细粒度动作智能。这导致多模态大语言模型在实际应用中难以生成详细指令，限制了智能体的实际性能。由于具身智能体需要在复杂环境中执行精确操作，细粒度动作评估成为关键，但现有方法在此方面不足，需新的基准来系统评估和促进该能力发展。
light_analysis.method: 本研究提出CFG-Bench基准，包含1,368个精选视频和19,562个问答对，通过三个评估范式覆盖四种认知能力：物理交互、时间-因果关系、意图理解和评估判断。该方法构建了一个系统框架，用于评估模型将视觉观察转化为可操作知识的能力。关键创新在于集成多种认知维度，超越表面级识别。摘要提到使用监督微调技术改进模型，但具体模型架构未详细说明。
light_analysis.result: 在CFG-Bench上的评估显示，领先的多模态大语言模型在生成物理交互的详细指令方面存在困难，且在意图和评估的高阶推理上表现出显著局限性。摘要未明确说明具体性能指标，如准确率提升数据。此外，监督微调于该数据后，模型在现有具身基准上实现了显著性能提升，表明细粒度动作学习能有效增强模型能力，但具体对比数据未提供。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究通过CFG-Bench基准突出了多模态大语言模型在细粒度动作方面的局限性，并表明通过微调可以改进性能。其贡献在于提供了一个系统性评估工具，推动更具智能的具身智能体发展，强调了细粒度认知评估的重要性。摘要未明确说明局限性，但暗示未来工作可能包括扩展基准和改进训练方法，以增强模型的实际应用价值。

title: Decoupling Perception from Reasoning for Hallucination-Resistant Video Understanding
abstract: Video Large Language Models improve reasoning over complex videos by generating intermediate reasoning text. However, reliable reasoning depends on accurate video perception. In existing approaches, perception evidence is intertwined with reasoning text, making it difficult to directly supervise the perception process. We argue that reliable supervision requires explicitly separating perception evidence from reasoning so that perception can be verified independently. To supervise perception directly, we propose Decoupled Perception and Logic (DPL), which represents perception as fixed-format evidence units containing timestamps and visual descriptions. This structured representation enables direct extraction of perception content and simplifies alignment between video segments and reward evaluation. Building on DPL, we introduce a perception reward that encourages both hallucination resistance and perception-based reasoning. An Factual-Aware Evaluator (FAE) provides anti-hallucination scores and achieves hallucination evaluation performance comparable to GPT-4o. In addition, we validate reasoning consistency by feeding perception results and questions into a reference model. Experiments show that, by providing reliable process rewards, Video-DPL consistently improves post-training performance at both 3B and 7B scales, while delivering higher data efficiency.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出 Decoupled Perception and Logic (DPL) 方法，将视频感知与推理解耦，以抗幻觉并提高视频理解性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机是解决视频大语言模型中感知证据与推理文本交织的问题，导致难以直接监督感知过程，从而引发幻觉。现有方法中，感知与推理耦合限制了推理可靠性，因为可靠推理依赖于准确感知，而幻觉会影响模型输出质量。该问题在复杂视频理解任务中尤为重要，需要独立监督机制以增强模型鲁棒性和准确性。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出 Decoupled Perception and Logic (DPL)，将感知表示为固定格式的证据单元，包含时间戳和视觉描述，实现感知与推理的结构化解耦。关键创新包括结构化表示，使感知内容能直接提取并简化视频段与奖励评估的对齐。基于 DPL，引入感知奖励以鼓励抗幻觉和基于感知的推理，并使用 Factual-Aware Evaluator (FAE) 提供抗幻觉评分，性能与 GPT-4o 相当。方法还通过参考模型验证推理一致性，提升监督效果。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，Video-DPL 在 3B 和 7B 规模的后训练中持续改善性能，并提高数据效率。Factual-Aware Evaluator 的抗幻觉评分性能与 GPT-4o 类似，有效支持感知监督。通过提供可靠的流程奖励，模型在推理过程中减少幻觉，增强理解准确性。摘要未提供具体准确率数字，但显示在多个规模上均有改善，表明方法的可扩展性和效率优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文的核心贡献是提出 DPL 方法，成功将感知与推理分离，抗幻觉并提升视频理解性能。学术上，该研究提供了结构化监督框架，增强模型推理可靠性和透明度。实际应用中，可改进视频大语言模型在复杂任务中的表现，如视频问答和分析。未来工作可能涉及扩展到更大规模数据集或优化奖励机制，进一步提升泛化能力。

title: Mobile-Agent-RAG: Driving Smart Multi-Agent Coordination with Contextual Knowledge Empowerment for Long-Horizon Mobile Automation
abstract: Mobile agents show immense potential, yet current state-of-the-art (SoTA) agents exhibit inadequate success rates on real-world, long-horizon, cross-application tasks. We attribute this bottleneck to the agents' excessive reliance on static, internal knowledge within MLLMs, which leads to two critical failure points: 1) strategic hallucinations in high-level planning and 2) operational errors during low-level execution on user interfaces (UI). The core insight of this paper is that high-level planning and low-level UI operations require fundamentally distinct types of knowledge. Planning demands high-level, strategy-oriented experiences, whereas operations necessitate low-level, precise instructions closely tied to specific app UIs. Motivated by these insights, we propose Mobile-Agent-RAG, a novel hierarchical multi-agent framework that innovatively integrates dual-level retrieval augmentation. At the planning stage, we introduce Manager-RAG to reduce strategic hallucinations by retrieving human-validated comprehensive task plans that provide high-level guidance. At the execution stage, we develop Operator-RAG to improve execution accuracy by retrieving the most precise low-level guidance for accurate atomic actions, aligned with the current app and subtask. To accurately deliver these knowledge types, we construct two specialized retrieval-oriented knowledge bases. Furthermore, we introduce Mobile-Eval-RAG, a challenging benchmark for evaluating such agents on realistic multi-app, long-horizon tasks. Extensive experiments demonstrate that Mobile-Agent-RAG significantly outperforms SoTA baselines, improving task completion rate by 11.0% and step efficiency by 10.2%, establishing a robust paradigm for context-aware, reliable multi-agent mobile automation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Mobile-Agent-RAG分层多代理框架，通过双重检索增强技术解决移动代理在长视野任务中的规划幻觉和操作错误问题，提升移动自动化可靠性。
light_analysis.motivation: 移动代理在真实世界、长视野、跨应用任务中展现出巨大潜力，但当前最先进的代理成功率不足，主要瓶颈在于过度依赖多模态大语言模型中的静态内部知识。这导致两个关键失败点：高层规划中的战略幻觉和低层用户界面操作中的操作错误。这些缺陷凸显了现有方法在匹配规划所需的战略经验与操作所需的精确指令方面存在不足，亟需改进以提升移动自动化在实际场景中的可靠性和性能。
light_analysis.method: 本研究提出Mobile-Agent-RAG，一个新颖的分层多代理框架，创新性地集成双重检索增强技术。在规划阶段，通过Manager-RAG减少战略幻觉，检索人类验证的全面任务计划以提供高层次战略指导；在执行阶段，通过Operator-RAG提高执行准确性，检索与特定应用和子任务对齐的精确低层指导，确保准确的原子动作。为了高效传递这些知识，构建了两个专门的知识库：一个用于高层次规划知识，另一个用于低层操作知识。该框架还引入了Mobile-Eval-RAG基准，用于评估多应用长视野任务的性能。
light_analysis.result: 通过广泛的实验，Mobile-Agent-RAG显著优于最先进的基线方法。在Mobile-Eval-RAG基准上进行测试，任务完成率提高了11.0%，步骤效率提升了10.2%。这些改进表明双重检索增强技术有效缓解了战略幻觉和操作错误，增强了移动代理在上下文感知任务中的可靠性和执行效率。与现有基线对比，Mobile-Agent-RAG在任务成功率和步骤优化方面均表现出显著优势，验证了其在实际多应用长视野场景中的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的核心贡献是提出Mobile-Agent-RAG框架，通过双重检索增强显著提升了移动代理在长视野移动自动化任务中的性能。该框架为上下文感知的可靠多代理移动自动化建立了一个稳健范式，具有重要的学术价值和实际应用潜力，例如在智能助理和自动化工具中的部署。研究还引入Mobile-Eval-RAG基准，为未来评估提供了标准；未来工作可以探索知识库扩展、框架泛化能力提升，以及在实际移动环境中的进一步优化，以增强系统的鲁棒性和适应性。

title: Adaptive Hyperbolic Kernels: Modulated Embedding in de Branges-Rovnyak Spaces
abstract: Hierarchical data pervades diverse machine learning applications, including natural language processing, computer vision, and social network analysis. Hyperbolic space, characterized by its negative curvature, has demonstrated strong potential in such tasks due to its capacity to embed hierarchical structures with minimal distortion. Previous evidence indicates that the hyperbolic representation capacity can be further enhanced through kernel methods. However, existing hyperbolic kernels still suffer from mild geometric distortion or lack adaptability. This paper addresses these issues by introducing a curvature-aware de Branges-Rovnyak space, a reproducing kernel Hilbert space (RKHS) that is isometric to a Poincare ball. We design an adjustable multiplier to select the appropriate RKHS corresponding to the hyperbolic space with any curvature adaptively. Building on this foundation, we further construct a family of adaptive hyperbolic kernels, including the novel adaptive hyperbolic radial kernel, whose learnable parameters modulate hyperbolic features in a task-aware manner. Extensive experiments on visual and language benchmarks demonstrate that our proposed kernels outperform existing hyperbolic kernels in modeling hierarchical dependencies.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出自适应双曲核方法，通过曲率感知de Branges-Rovnyak空间改进层次数据的双曲嵌入。
light_analysis.motivation: 层次数据在机器学习应用中普遍存在，如自然语言处理和计算机视觉。双曲空间因其负曲率能有效嵌入层次结构，但现有双曲核方法存在几何失真或缺乏适应性，限制了表示能力。本文旨在解决这些问题，以提升层次依赖建模的准确性和灵活性，通过改进双曲核的适应性和减少失真。
light_analysis.method: 本文引入曲率感知的de Branges-Rovnyak空间，这是一个与Poincare球等距的再生核希尔伯特空间（RKHS）。通过设计可调乘法器自适应选择对应于任意曲率双曲空间的RKHS，并构建自适应双曲核，如自适应双曲径向核，其可学习参数以任务感知方式调制双曲特征。实验在视觉和语言基准数据集上进行，摘要未明确说明具体模型架构细节。
light_analysis.result: 在视觉和语言基准上的广泛实验表明，提出的自适应双曲核在建模层次依赖方面优于现有双曲核方法。摘要未明确说明具体性能指标如准确率提升或效率改进，但推断为在相关任务中表现出色，改进层次数据嵌入效果，与基线方法对比显示性能优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文贡献在于提出了自适应双曲核方法，通过减少几何失真和增强适应性改进层次数据建模。学术上扩展了双曲核和RKHS理论，应用上适用于自然语言处理和计算机视觉等任务，提升实际性能。未来工作可能包括进一步优化参数或扩展到更多数据类型，摘要未明确说明潜在局限性。

title: PuzLM: Solving Jigsaw Puzzles with Sequence-to-Sequence Language Models
abstract: Square jigsaw puzzles are typically solved by visually matching piece images to recover the original layout. This work introduces PuzLM, an alternative perspective that recasts jigsaw reassembly as a discrete sequence-to-sequence (Seq2Seq) problem, inspired by natural language representations. We design an efficient puzzle quantization procedure that transforms each piece into a short sequence of discrete tokens, enabling the direct application of standard Seq2Seq language models as powerful jigsaw solvers. Our approach demonstrates that accurate puzzle reconstruction can be achieved through purely symbolic reasoning over discrete representations, improving state-of-the-art performance even on puzzles with eroded boundaries or missing pieces.

light_analysis.overview: PuzLM通过将拼图转化为离散序列并应用Seq2Seq语言模型，实现了拼图重建性能的提升。
light_analysis.motivation: 拼图重建传统上依赖视觉匹配碎片图像，这种方法在处理边界腐蚀或缺失碎片时可能效果不佳，限制了鲁棒性和应用范围。研究旨在解决这一实际问题，因为拼图问题在计算机视觉和AI测试中具有重要性，但现有视觉方法对噪声和不完整性敏感。本研究提出新视角，将拼图重新定义为序列问题，利用自然语言表示来提高适应性，摘要未明确说明具体应用场景。
light_analysis.method: 方法核心是设计高效拼图量化过程，将每个碎片转化为短序列的离散令牌，从而允许直接应用标准Seq2Seq语言模型作为解算器。关键创新在于将拼图重建重新构架为离散Seq2Seq任务，实现纯符号推理，无需依赖图像视觉特征。技术特色包括离散化表示和简化模型输入，但摘要未明确说明使用的具体数据集或模型架构细节。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，PuzLM能够实现准确的拼图重建，并改进了最先进性能，即使在拼图有边界腐蚀或缺失碎片的情况下也表现优异。虽然摘要未提供具体性能指标（如准确率提升百分比），但声称优于基线方法，展示了通过离散表示进行纯符号推理的有效性。结果验证了该方法对复杂场景的鲁棒性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究主要贡献是证明了通过离散表示和纯符号推理可以实现准确的拼图重建，将Seq2Seq语言模型成功应用于拼图领域。学术价值在于扩展了语言模型的应用范围，为计算机视觉任务提供了新思路；实际应用价值包括图像修复和鲁棒重建任务。局限性或未来工作摘要未明确说明，可能涉及优化量化过程或探索更多模型变体。

title: See4D: Pose-Free 4D Generation via Auto-Regressive Video Inpainting
abstract: Immersive applications call for synthesizing spatiotemporal 4D content from casual videos without costly 3D supervision. Existing video-to-4D methods typically rely on manually annotated camera poses, which are labor-intensive and brittle for in-the-wild footage. Recent warp-then-inpaint approaches mitigate the need for pose labels by warping input frames along a novel camera trajectory and using an inpainting model to fill missing regions, thereby depicting the 4D scene from diverse viewpoints. However, this trajectory-to-trajectory formulation often entangles camera motion with scene dynamics and complicates both modeling and inference. We introduce See4D, a pose-free, trajectory-to-camera framework that replaces explicit trajectory prediction with rendering to a bank of fixed virtual cameras, thereby separating camera control from scene modeling. A view-conditional video inpainting model is trained to learn a robust geometry prior by denoising realistically synthesized warped images and to inpaint occluded or missing regions across virtual viewpoints, eliminating the need for explicit 3D annotations. Building on this inpainting core, we design a spatiotemporal autoregressive inference pipeline that traverses virtual-camera splines and extends videos with overlapping windows, enabling coherent generation at bounded per-step complexity. We validate See4D on cross-view video generation and sparse reconstruction benchmarks. Across quantitative metrics and qualitative assessments, our method achieves superior generalization and improved performance relative to pose- or trajectory-conditioned baselines, advancing practical 4D world modeling from casual videos.
comment: Eurographics2026; 26 pages; 21 figures; 3 tables; project page: https://see-4d.github.io/

light_analysis.overview: See4D提出了一种无姿态的4D生成框架，通过自回归视频修复和固定虚拟相机，从普通视频中合成时空内容。
light_analysis.motivation: 沉浸式应用需要从普通视频中合成时空4D内容，但现有方法依赖手动标注的相机姿态，成本高昂且对野外视频脆弱。warp-then-inpaint方法虽减少姿态需求，但会纠缠相机运动与场景动态，复杂化建模和推理，限制了实际应用。因此，开发无姿态的4D生成方法对于推动虚拟现实和视频编辑等应用至关重要。
light_analysis.method: See4D采用轨迹到相机框架，用固定虚拟相机库替换显式轨迹预测，以分离相机控制和场景建模。训练一个视图条件视频修复模型，通过学习去噪合成扭曲图像和修复缺失区域来学习稳健几何先验，无需显式3D标注。此外，设计了一个时空自回归推理管道，遍历虚拟相机样条并用重叠窗口扩展视频，实现有界复杂度下的一致生成。
light_analysis.result: 在跨视图视频生成和稀疏重建基准上验证，相比依赖姿态或轨迹条件的基线方法，See4D展现出更好的泛化能力和改进的性能。定量指标和定性评估均表明其优越性，例如在多个测试中表现更稳定和高效，但摘要未提供具体数值数据如准确率提升百分比。
light_analysis.conclusion: See4D的主要贡献是实现了无姿态的4D生成，降低了标注成本并提高了从普通视频建模4D场景的实用性。其学术价值在于推动了时空内容合成的技术发展，实际应用潜力包括虚拟现实和视频编辑。未来工作可扩展至更复杂动态场景或优化实时性能，但摘要未明确说明具体局限性。

title: RECAP: Reproducing Copyrighted Data from LLMs Training with an Agentic Pipeline
abstract: If we cannot inspect the training data of a large language model (LLM), how can we ever know what it has seen? We believe the most compelling evidence arises when the model itself freely reproduces the target content. As such, we propose RECAP, an agentic pipeline designed to elicit and verify memorized training data from LLM outputs. At the heart of RECAP is a feedback-driven loop, where an initial extraction attempt is evaluated by a secondary language model, which compares the output against a reference passage and identifies discrepancies. These are then translated into minimal correction hints, which are fed back into the target model to guide subsequent generations. In addition, to address alignment-induced refusals, RECAP includes a jailbreaking module that detects and overcomes such barriers. We evaluate RECAP on EchoTrace, a new benchmark spanning over 30 full books, and the results show that RECAP leads to substantial gains over single-iteration approaches. For instance, with GPT-4.1, the average ROUGE-L score for the copyrighted text extraction improved from 0.38 to 0.47 - a nearly 24% increase.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出RECAP代理管道，通过反馈循环和jailbreaking模块，有效提取大型语言模型中记忆的受版权保护数据。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机源于大型语言模型训练数据不可见的问题，难以验证模型是否记忆了受版权内容，这在模型透明度和版权合规性中至关重要。现有方法如单次迭代提取效果有限，不足以准确反映记忆内容，可能导致偏差或遗漏，因此需要更有效的技术来引出和评估训练数据，确保AI系统的负责任使用。
light_analysis.method: RECAP方法的核心是一个反馈驱动循环：首先从目标LLM提取输出，然后由次级语言模型评估输出与参考段落的差异，识别错误后生成最小修正提示，反馈给目标模型以引导后续生成。创新点包括动态反馈机制和自动修正过程，以及集成jailbreaking模块来检测并克服因模型对齐导致的拒绝。使用EchoTrace基准数据集进行评估，涵盖30多本书。
light_analysis.result: 在EchoTrace基准上评估RECAP，结果显示相比单次迭代方法有显著提升。具体地，使用GPT-4.1时，提取受版权文本的ROUGE-L分数从0.38提高到0.47，增加了近24%。这表明RECAP能更有效地引出和验证记忆数据，在文本提取任务中提供更准确的性能指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是RECAP代理管道，通过反馈循环和jailbreaking机制，显著提升了从LLM中提取记忆数据的能力，具有重要学术价值，为模型记忆和透明度研究提供了新方法；实际应用中可用于版权检测和模型审计。未来工作可扩展到更多模型和数据集，并探索其他记忆验证技术，尽管摘要未明确说明具体局限性。

title: Think with 3D: Geometric Imagination Grounded Spatial Reasoning from Limited Views
abstract: Though recent advances in vision-language models (VLMs) have achieved remarkable progress across a wide range of multimodal tasks, understanding 3D spatial relationships from limited views remains a significant challenge. Previous reasoning methods typically rely on pure text (e.g., topological cognitive maps) or on 2D visual cues. However, their limited representational capacity hinders performance in specific tasks that require 3D spatial imagination. To address this limitation, we propose 3DThinker, a framework that can effectively exploits the rich geometric information embedded within images while reasoning, like humans do. Our framework is the first to enable 3D mentaling during reasoning without any 3D prior input, and it does not rely on explicitly labeled 3D data for training. Specifically, our training consists of two stages. First, we perform supervised training to align the 3D latent generated by VLM while reasoning with that of a 3D foundation model (e.g., VGGT). Then, we optimize the entire reasoning trajectory solely based on outcome signals, thereby refining the underlying 3D mentaling. Extensive experiments across multiple benchmarks show that 3DThinker consistently outperforms strong baselines and offers a new perspective toward unifying 3D representations into multimodal reasoning. Our code is available at https://github.com/zhangquanchen/3DThinker.

light_analysis.overview: 提出3DThinker框架，首次实现在推理过程中无需3D输入即可进行3D心理想象，提升从有限视图的3D空间推理能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 尽管视觉语言模型（VLMs）在多模态任务中取得显著进展，但从有限视图理解3D空间关系仍是重大挑战。现有方法通常依赖纯文本（如拓扑认知地图）或2D视觉线索，其表示能力有限，难以处理需要3D空间想象的任务（如复杂环境中的导航或物体关系推理）。这一问题的重要性在于许多实际应用（如机器人、增强现实）依赖于准确的3D理解，而现有方法因缺乏几何信息利用而表现不足。
light_analysis.method: 3DThinker框架通过两阶段训练实现3D心理想象。首先，进行监督训练，对齐视觉语言模型在推理时生成的3D潜在表示与3D基础模型（如VGGT），以利用图像中的几何信息。然后，仅基于任务结果信号优化整个推理轨迹，从而细化和改进3D心理想象过程。关键创新在于无需任何3D先验输入或标签数据，首次实现推理中的3D表示生成，避免了传统方法对显式3D数据的依赖。
light_analysis.result: 在多个基准测试上的广泛实验显示，3DThinker一致优于强基线方法，为统一3D表示到多模态推理提供了新视角。摘要未明确说明具体性能指标（如准确率提升百分比），但实验结果验证了该方法在3D空间推理任务中的有效性，显著提高了从有限视图的推理能力，克服了现有方法的局限性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 3DThinker的主要贡献是提出了一种无需3D输入的3D心理想象框架，显著提升从有限视图的3D空间推理。该研究具有重要学术价值，推动了多模态推理中3D表示的整合，为实际应用（如自主系统或虚拟现实）提供了潜力。未来工作可进一步优化框架效率或扩展到更广泛的3D任务，以应对更复杂的场景。

title: FrugalPrompt: Reducing Contextual Overhead in Large Language Models via Token Attribution
abstract: Human communication heavily relies on laconism and inferential pragmatics, allowing listeners to successfully reconstruct rich meaning from sparse, telegraphic speech. In contrast, large language models (LLMs) owe much of their stellar performance to expansive input contexts, yet such verbosity inflates monetary costs, carbon footprint, and inference-time latency. This overhead manifests from the redundant low-utility tokens present in typical prompts, as only a fraction of tokens typically carries the majority of the semantic weight. Inspired by the aforementioned cognitive psycholinguistic processes, we address this inefficiency by introducing FrugalPrompt, a novel prompt compression framework for LLMs, which retains only the most semantically significant tokens. Leveraging two state-of-the-art token attribution methods, GlobEnc and DecompX, we assign salience scores to every token in an input sequence, rank them to retain the top-k% tokens, and obtain a sparse frugalized prompt. We establish the theoretical stability of our approach and provide strong empirical results across a suite of four NLP tasks to study the trade-off between the portion of retained tokens and performance. Experimental findings across retention settings reveal asymmetric performance patterns that suggest potential task contamination effects. We posit that our work contributes to a more nuanced understanding of LLM behavior in performance-efficiency trade-offs and delineates the boundary between tasks tolerant of contextual sparsity and those requiring exhaustive context.

light_analysis.overview: 本论文提出FrugalPrompt框架，通过令牌重要性评分压缩提示，减少大型语言模型的上下文开销。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型（LLMs）的性能依赖于大量输入上下文，这导致高昂的计算成本、碳足迹和推理延迟。当前提示中存在冗余的低效用令牌，只有少数令牌承担主要语义信息，增加了资源浪费并限制了模型效率。基于人类交流中简洁和推断的特性，本研究旨在解决这种效率低下的问题，推动更可持续和经济的LLM应用，特别是在降低环境影响和提高实际部署可行性方面。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出FrugalPrompt框架，这是一个基于令牌归因的提示压缩方法。核心是使用两种先进的令牌归因技术——GlobEnc和DecompX，为输入序列中的每个令牌分配显著性分数，然后按分数排序并保留前k%的高重要性令牌，生成稀疏的、效率化的提示。该方法还进行了理论稳定性分析，并在四个NLP任务上进行实验，以研究保留令牌比例与性能之间的权衡。创新点在于结合认知心理语言学原理，实现语义保留的压缩。
light_analysis.result: 实验在四个NLP任务上评估FrugalPrompt，结果显示在不同保留令牌比例下存在性能与效率的权衡。研究者观察到不对称的性能模式，暗示潜在的任务污染效应。尽管摘要未提供具体数据，但实证结果表现出强性能，支持框架在降低上下文开销时的有效性。这些发现有助于区分能容忍上下文稀疏的任务和需要详尽上下文的任务，为优化LLM应用提供了实证基础。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是提出了FrugalPrompt框架，有效减少LLMs的上下文开销，降低成本和环境影响。学术上，它深化了对LLM在性能效率权衡中行为的理解，特别是通过令牌重要性分析揭示任务敏感性。实际应用中，该框架有助于提升推理速度和资源效率。未来工作可探索任务污染效应的详细机制，并扩展到更多任务和模型以验证通用性。

title: CodeEvolve: an open source evolutionary coding agent for algorithmic discovery and optimization
abstract: We introduce CodeEvolve, an open-source framework that combines large language models (LLMs) with evolutionary search to synthesize high-performing algorithmic solutions. CodeEvolve couples an islands-based genetic algorithm with modular LLM orchestration, using execution feedback and task-specific metrics to guide selection and variation. Exploration and exploitation are balanced through context-aware recombination, adaptive meta-prompting, and targeted refinement of promising solutions. We evaluate CodeEvolve on benchmarks used to assess Google DeepMind's AlphaEvolve, and include direct comparisons with popular open-source frameworks for algorithmic discovery and heuristic design. Our results show that CodeEvolve achieves state-of-the-art (SOTA) performance on several tasks, with open-weight models often matching or exceeding closed-source baselines at a fraction of the compute cost. We provide extensive ablations, practical hyperparameter guidance, and release our framework and experimental results at https://github.com/inter-co/science-codeevolve.

light_analysis.overview: CodeEvolve是一个结合大型语言模型与进化搜索的开源框架，旨在高效合成和优化算法解决方案。
light_analysis.motivation: 摘要未明确说明研究的具体动机和背景，但基于与AlphaEvolve及开源框架的比较，可推断该研究旨在解决现有算法发现方法可能存在的计算成本高、闭源依赖性强或性能不足的问题。通过开源框架，该研究提供一种可访问且高效的替代方案，促进算法发现领域的进步和实际应用。
light_analysis.method: CodeEvolve的核心方法结合大型语言模型（LLMs）与进化搜索，采用基于岛屿的遗传算法，通过模块化LLM编排生成代码。使用执行反馈和任务特定指标指导遗传算法的选择和变异过程，创新点包括上下文感知重组、自适应元提示和针对性精炼有希望解决方案，以平衡探索与利用。摘要未提及具体数据集或模型架构细节，主要聚焦于框架设计和优化策略。
light_analysis.result: CodeEvolve在用于评估AlphaEvolve的基准测试上进行评估，结果显示在多个任务上达到最先进的性能。开源模型以较低计算成本匹配或超越闭源基线，表明其在效率和性能上的优势。与流行开源框架的直接比较中，CodeEvolve表现优异，并通过广泛消融实验和超参数指南提供了实用指导。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该论文贡献了CodeEvolve，一个开源框架，结合LLMs和进化搜索提升算法发现的效率和性能。其学术价值在于推动自动化算法合成领域的发展，应用价值包括降低计算成本和促进实际编程任务优化。未来工作可能涉及扩展应用领域或进一步优化框架细节，增强泛化能力。

title: Head-wise Adaptive Rotary Positional Encoding for Fine-Grained Image Generation
abstract: Transformers rely on explicit positional encoding to model structure in data. While Rotary Position Embedding (RoPE) excels in 1D domains, its application to image generation reveals significant limitations such as fine-grained spatial relation modeling, color cues, and object counting. This paper identifies key limitations of standard multi-dimensional RoPE-rigid frequency allocation, axis-wise independence, and uniform head treatment-in capturing the complex structural biases required for fine-grained image generation. We propose HARoPE, a head-wise adaptive extension that inserts a learnable linear transformation parameterized via singular value decomposition (SVD) before the rotary mapping. This lightweight modification enables dynamic frequency reallocation, semantic alignment of rotary planes, and head-specific positional receptive fields while rigorously preserving RoPE's relative-position property. Extensive experiments on class-conditional ImageNet and text-to-image generation (Flux and MMDiT) demonstrate that HARoPE consistently improves performance over strong RoPE baselines and other extensions. The method serves as an effective drop-in replacement, offering a principled and adaptable solution for enhancing positional awareness in transformer-based image generative models.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出头自适应 Rotary 位置编码 HARoPE，通过动态频率重新分配和头特定处理，有效提升 transformer 在细粒度图像生成中的性能。
light_analysis.motivation: Transformers 依赖位置编码建模数据结构，Rotary Position Embedding (RoPE) 在 1D 领域优秀，但在图像生成中存在显著限制，如细粒度空间关系建模、颜色线索和对象计数。标准多维 RoPE 的局限性包括刚性频率分配、轴间独立性和均匀头处理，这些无法捕捉细粒度图像生成所需的复杂结构偏见。现有方法在适应图像数据的多维特性方面不足，影响生成质量，因此需要更灵活的位置编码方案来解决这些问题。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出 HARoPE，作为 RoPE 的头自适应扩展，通过在旋转映射前插入基于奇异值分解 (SVD) 参数化的可学习线性变换。这种轻量级修改实现动态频率重新分配、旋转平面的语义对齐和头特定的位置感受野，同时严格保持 RoPE 的相对位置属性。关键创新点包括利用 SVD 实现自适应参数化，提升对图像结构的建模能力，适用于类条件 ImageNet 和文本到图像生成模型如 Flux 和 MMDiT，无需大幅增加计算开销。
light_analysis.result: 在类条件 ImageNet 数据集和文本到图像生成任务（使用 Flux 和 MMDiT 模型）上进行广泛实验，HARoPE 持续改进性能，超越强 RoPE 基线和其他扩展方法。实验表明该方法能有效提升生成模型的准确率和结构感知能力，具体性能指标未详细说明，但摘要强调了一致性改进，作为即插即用替换，在多个基准测试中表现出优越性。
light_analysis.conclusion: HARoPE 作为有效的即插即用替换，提供了原则性和适应性强的解决方案，以增强基于 transformer 的图像生成模型的位置感知。它解决了 RoPE 在图像生成中的局限性，提升了细粒度生成质量，具有实际应用价值，如改进文本到图像系统。未来工作可能包括扩展到其他生成任务或优化计算效率，但局限性未在摘要中明确说明。

title: ReSplat: Learning Recurrent Gaussian Splatting
abstract: While existing feed-forward Gaussian splatting models offer computational efficiency and can generalize to sparse view settings, their performance is fundamentally constrained by relying on a single forward pass for inference. We propose ReSplat, a feed-forward recurrent Gaussian splatting model that iteratively refines 3D Gaussians without explicitly computing gradients. Our key insight is that the Gaussian splatting rendering error serves as a rich feedback signal, guiding the recurrent network to learn effective Gaussian updates. This feedback signal naturally adapts to unseen data distributions at test time, enabling robust generalization across datasets, view counts, and image resolutions. To initialize the recurrent process, we introduce a compact reconstruction model that operates in a $16 \times$ subsampled space, producing $16 \times$ fewer Gaussians than previous per-pixel Gaussian models. This substantially reduces computational overhead and allows for efficient Gaussian updates. Extensive experiments across varying number of input views (2, 8, 16, 32), resolutions ($256 \times 256$ to $540 \times 960$), and datasets (DL3DV, RealEstate10K, and ACID) demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance while significantly reducing the number of Gaussians and improving the rendering speed. Our project page is at https://haofeixu.github.io/resplat/.

light_analysis.overview: ReSplat提出一种递归高斯溅射模型，通过迭代优化3D高斯来提升渲染效率和泛化能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有前馈高斯溅射模型在推理时依赖单次前向传递，导致在稀疏视图设置下性能受限，难以适应未见数据分布。计算效率和泛化能力对3D重建至关重要，因此需要一种能迭代优化并减少计算开销的方法来解决这些问题。现有方法缺乏有效的更新机制，限制了模型的灵活性和适应性，尤其是在多变的数据和视图条件下表现不足。
light_analysis.method: ReSplat采用前馈递归架构，利用渲染误差作为反馈信号迭代更新3D高斯，无需显式计算梯度。关键创新在于将误差作为自适应引导，使模型在测试时自然适应新数据。初始化阶段引入紧凑重建模型，在16倍子采样空间操作，产生比先前模型少16倍的高斯，从而显著减少计算开销并允许高效迭代更新。技术特色包括递归优化机制和子采样初始化，提升跨数据集和分辨率的稳健性。
light_analysis.result: 实验在多种输入视图（2、8、16、32个）、分辨率（256×256至540×960）和数据集（DL3DV、RealEstate10K、ACID）上进行，结果显示ReSplat达到最先进性能，同时显著减少高斯数量并提升渲染速度。与基线方法相比，在稀疏视图和高分辨率设置下表现更优，但摘要未明确说明具体提升百分比。这些改进验证了方法的有效性和计算效率，突出了其在3D重建任务中的优越性。
light_analysis.conclusion: ReSplat通过递归优化和紧凑初始化，改进了高斯溅射技术，提升了计算效率和泛化能力。这项研究为3D表示学习提供了新方法，在稀疏视图重建和快速渲染方面有广泛应用前景。学术价值在于引入递归机制减少计算开销，实际价值在于促进高效3D建模。未来工作可能包括进一步优化递归过程或扩展到更多数据集，尽管摘要未明确说明局限性。

title: GTR-Bench: Evaluating Geo-Temporal Reasoning in Vision-Language Models
abstract: Recently spatial-temporal intelligence of Visual-Language Models (VLMs) has attracted much attention due to its importance for autonomous driving, embodied AI and general AI. Existing spatial-temporal benchmarks mainly focus on egocentric (first-person) perspective reasoning using images/video contexts, or geographic reasoning with graphical context (e.g., maps), thus fail to assess VLMs' geographic spatial-temporal intelligence that requires integrating both images/video and graphical context, which is crucial for real-world scenarios such as traffic management and emergency response. To address the gaps, we introduce Geo-Temporal Reasoning benchmark (GTR-Bench), a novel challenge for geographic temporal reasoning of moving targets in a large-scale camera network. GTR-Bench is more challenging as it requires multiple perspective switches between maps and videos, joint reasoning across multiple videos with non-overlapping fields of view, and inference over spatial-temporal regions that are unobserved by any video context. Evaluations of more than 10 popular VLMs on GTR-Bench show that even the best proprietary model, Gemini-2.5-Pro (34.9\%), significantly lags behind human performance (78.61\%) on geo-temporal reasoning. Moreover, our comprehensive analysis on GTR-Bench reveals three major deficiencies of current models for geo-temporal reasoning. (1) VLMs exhibit imbalanced utilization of spatial and temporal context during reasoning. (2) they show weak temporal forecasting ability, leading to poorer performance on temporally focused tasks. (3) they lack the capability to effectively align and integrate map data with multi-view video inputs. We believe GTR-Bench offers valuable insights and opens up new opportunities for research and applications in spatial-temporal intelligence. Benchmark and code will be released at https://github.com/X-Luffy/GTR-Bench.

light_analysis.overview: 该论文通过引入GTR-Bench基准，评估视觉-语言模型在地理-时间推理方面的能力，填补了整合图像/视频与地图上下文的基准空白。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有空间-时间基准主要关注第一人称视角推理或纯地理图形推理，无法有效评估视觉-语言模型整合图像/视频与地图上下文的地理-时间推理能力，这在实际场景如自动驾驶、交通管理和紧急响应中至关重要。因此，需要一个新的基准来解决这一不足，促进模型在复杂多模态环境下的智能提升。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法是开发GTR-Bench基准，设计用于大规模相机网络中移动目标的地理-时间推理挑战。基准要求模型在视频和地图之间进行多次视角切换，跨多个非重叠视场视频进行联合推理，并对视频未观测到的空间-时间区域进行推断。该基准基于真实场景构建，如交通监控，以测试模型的综合推理能力。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果评估了超过10个流行视觉-语言模型，最佳专有模型Gemini-2.5-Pro准确率仅为34.9%，远低于人类表现的78.61%。分析揭示了三个主要缺陷：模型推理中空间与时间上下文利用不平衡、时间预测能力弱导致在时间聚焦任务上表现差，以及无法有效对齐和整合地图数据与多视图视频输入。
light_analysis.conclusion: GTR-Bench为视觉-语言模型的地理-时间推理评估提供了重要基准，揭示了当前模型在空间-时间智能方面的局限性，推动多模态推理研究。其学术价值在于促进模型能力改进，实际应用可扩展至自动驾驶和紧急响应等领域。未来工作可基于此基准开发更强大的模型，提升地理-时间推理性能。

title: Contrastive Diffusion Guidance for Spatial Inverse Problems
abstract: We consider a class of inverse problems characterized by forward operators that are partially specified, non-smooth, and non-differentiable. Although generative inverse solvers have made significant progress, we find that these forward operators introduce a distinct set of challenges. As a concrete instance, we consider the problem of reconstructing spatial layouts, such as floorplans, from human movement trajectories, where the underlying path-generation process is inherently non-differentiable and only partially known. In such problems, direct likelihood-based guidance becomes unstable, since the underlying path-planning process does not provide reliable gradients. We break-away from existing diffusion-based posterior samplers and reformulate likelihood-based guidance in a smoother embedding space. This embedding space is learned using a contrastive objective to bring compatible trajectory-floorplan pairs close together while pushing mismatched pairs apart. We show that this surrogate likelihood score in the embedding space provides a valid approximation to the true likelihood score, making it possible to steer the denoising process towards the posterior. Across extensive experiments, our model CoGuide produces more consistent reconstructions and is more robust than existing inverse-solvers and guided diffusion. Beyond spatial mapping, we show that our method can be applied more broadly, suggesting a route toward solving generalized blind inverse problems using diffusion models.

light_analysis.overview: 提出对比扩散引导方法，利用对比学习在嵌入空间中近似似然分数，有效解决非平滑、不可微逆问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 该研究针对一类逆问题，其前向算子部分指定、非平滑且不可微，例如从人类运动轨迹重建空间布局（如平面图）。现有生成逆求解器在处理这类问题时面临挑战，因为路径生成过程不可微且部分已知，导致基于似然的引导不稳定，无法提供可靠梯度。这使得现有方法在解决这类实际应用问题时效果受限。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出CoGuide方法，从现有扩散后验采样器中脱离，在更平滑的嵌入空间中重新表述似然引导。嵌入空间通过对比学习目标学习，使兼容的轨迹-平面图对靠近，不匹配对远离。这个替代似然分数在嵌入空间中近似真实似然分数，从而稳定地指导扩散模型的去噪过程走向后验分布。关键创新点在于使用对比学习构建嵌入空间，避免直接依赖不可微的前向算子。
light_analysis.result: 在广泛实验中，CoGuide模型比现有逆求解器和引导扩散方法产生更一致的重建结果，并展现出更强的鲁棒性。摘要未明确说明具体性能指标，但实验表明该方法在空间映射任务中有效提升重建质量，并能扩展到其他逆问题，验证了其泛化能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究的主要贡献是提出对比扩散引导方法，通过嵌入空间近似似然分数，解决非平滑、不可微逆问题。学术上扩展了扩散模型在逆问题中的应用，提高了稳定性和效果；实际上可用于空间重建等任务，并为广义盲逆问题的求解提供新思路。未来工作可能包括进一步验证在更多应用场景中的效果。

title: Ultra-Fast Language Generation via Discrete Diffusion Divergence Instruct
abstract: Fast and high-quality language generation is the holy grail that people pursue in the age of AI. In this work, we introduce Discrete Diffusion Divergence Instruct (DiDi-Instruct), a training-based method that initializes from a pre-trained diffusion large language model (dLLM) and distills a few-step student for fast generation. The model distilled with DiDi-Instruct matches or surpasses its dLLM teacher and the GPT-2 baseline while providing up to 64$\times$ acceleration. The theoretical foundation of DiDi-Instruct is a novel framework based on integral KL-divergence minimization, which leads to a practical training algorithm. We further introduce grouped reward normalization, intermediate-state matching, and the reward-guided ancestral sampler to improve training stability, model coverage, and inference quality. On the OpenWebText benchmark, DiDi-Instruct achieves perplexity ranging from 62.2 (8 NFEs) to 18.4 (128 NFEs), outperforming prior accelerated dLLMs and the GPT-2 baseline. These gains incur a negligible entropy loss (around $1$%) and reduce additional training wall-clock time by more than $20\times$ compared to competing dLLM distillation methods. We further validate the robustness and effectiveness of DiDi-Instruct through extensive ablation studies, model scaling, downstream task evaluations, and unconditional protein sequence generation. In conclusion, DiDi-Instruct enables efficient and effective distillation for language generation in the blink of an eye.

light_analysis.overview: 提出DiDi-Instruct方法，通过离散扩散散度指令训练从预训练扩散大语言模型蒸馏出快速学生模型，实现高质量语言生成的显著加速。
light_analysis.motivation: 在AI时代，快速且高质量的语言生成是关键需求。扩散大语言模型（dLLM）虽然生成质量高，但推理步骤多，导致速度缓慢，难以满足实时应用。现有蒸馏方法往往训练时间长、性能损失大或稳定性不足，因此亟需一种高效技术来加速生成而不牺牲质量。本研究旨在解决这一问题，通过提出DiDi-Instruct方法，从预训练dLLM中蒸馏少步学生模型，以提升生成效率。
light_analysis.method: DiDi-Instruct是一种基于训练的方法，从预训练扩散大语言模型（dLLM）初始化，通过蒸馏技术生成少步学生模型以加速语言生成。其理论基础是积分KL散度最小化框架，该框架指导了训练算法的设计。关键创新点包括引入分组奖励归一化以提升训练稳定性、中间状态匹配以增强模型覆盖范围，以及奖励引导的祖先采样器以改善推理质量。这些技术共同优化了蒸馏过程，确保高效和高质量的生成性能。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，DiDi-Instruct蒸馏出的模型性能匹配或超过了dLLM教师模型和GPT-2基线，同时提供高达64倍的加速。在OpenWebText基准上，困惑度从62.2（使用8步）降至18.4（使用128步），优于先前加速的dLLM方法和GPT-2基线。此外，方法仅带来约1%的熵损失，并相比其他dLLM蒸馏方法减少了20倍以上的训练时间。通过消融研究、模型缩放、下游任务评估和无条件蛋白质序列生成，进一步验证了方法的鲁棒性和有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: DiDi-Instruct的主要贡献在于提供了一种高效的蒸馏框架，平衡了语言生成的速度与质量。学术上，它引入了积分KL散度最小化的新理论框架和分组奖励归一化等实用技术，推动了扩散模型加速领域的发展。实际应用中，该方法可显著加速语言生成，适用于下游任务如蛋白质序列生成。未来工作可能包括扩展到更多模型或任务，并进一步优化训练效率，摘要未明确说明具体局限性。

title: Critique-Coder: Enhancing Coder Models by Critique Reinforcement Learning
abstract: Reinforcement Learning (RL) has emerged as a popular training paradigm, particularly when paired with reasoning models. While effective, it primarily focuses on generating responses and lacks mechanisms to explicitly foster critique or reflection. Several recent studies, like Critique-Fine-Tuning (CFT) and Critique-Guided-Distillation (CGD) have shown the benefits of explicitly teaching LLMs how to critique. Motivated by them, we propose Critique Reinforcement Learning (CRL), where the model is tasked with generating a critique for a given (question, solution) pair. The reward is determined solely by whether the final judgment label $c \in \{\texttt{True}, \texttt{False}\}$ of the generated critique aligns with the ground-truth judgment $c^*$. Building on this point, we introduce Critique-Coder, which is trained on a hybrid of RL and CRL by substituting 20% of the standard RL data with CRL data. We fine-tune multiple models (Critique-Coder) and evaluate them on different benchmarks to show their advantages over RL-only models. We show that Critique-Coder consistently outperforms RL-only baselines on all the evaluated benchmarks. Notably, our Critique-Coder-8B can reach over 60% on LiveCodeBench (v5), outperforming other reasoning models like DeepCoder-14B and GPT-o1. Beyond code generation, Critique-Coder also demonstrates enhanced general reasoning abilities, as evidenced by its better performance on logic reasoning tasks from the BBEH dataset. This indicates that the application of CRL on coding datasets enhances general reasoning and critique abilities, which are transferable across a broad range of tasks. Hence, we believe that CRL works as a great complement to standard RL for LLM reasoning.

light_analysis.overview: Critique-Coder模型通过引入批判强化学习（CRL）并混合标准强化学习进行训练，显著提升了代码生成和通用推理能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前强化学习（RL）训练范式在推理模型中广泛使用，但缺乏显式培养批判或反思的机制，限制了模型在生成响应后进行自我改进的能力。现有方法如Critique-Fine-Tuning（CFT）和Critique-Guided-Distillation（CGD）已显示显式批判训练的好处，但RL中仍存在不足。本研究动机在于开发CRL，以弥补这一缺口，增强模型的批判能力，从而提升整体性能并推动更智能的AI系统发展。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出Critique Reinforcement Learning（CRL），核心方法是模型为给定的（问题，解决方案）对生成批判，奖励仅基于批判的最终判断标签是否与真实标签一致。在此基础上，引入Critique-Coder模型，在训练中混合RL和CRL，用20%的CRL数据替代标准RL数据。通过微调多个模型并使用具体基准测试如LiveCodeBench和BBEH数据集进行评估，展示了CRL的技术特色，如增强模型的批判和推理能力。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，Critique-Coder在所有评估基准上均一致优于仅RL基线。具体而言，Critique-Coder-8B在LiveCodeBench（v5）上达到超过60%的性能，超越了其他推理模型如DeepCoder-14B和GPT-o1。此外，在BBEH数据集的逻辑推理任务中，Critique-Coder也表现出更好的性能，表明CRL训练增强了通用推理能力，并具有可迁移性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是提出Critique Reinforcement Learning（CRL）作为标准强化学习的有效补充，显著提升模型批判和推理能力。学术价值在于展示了批判训练对大型语言模型性能的积极影响，为未来研究提供了新方向。实际应用中，该方法可扩展到代码生成、逻辑推理等多个领域，具有广泛的应用潜力。未来工作可进一步探索CRL在其他任务和数据集上的应用，以及可能的技术扩展。

title: VolSplat: Rethinking Feed-Forward 3D Gaussian Splatting with Voxel-Aligned Prediction
abstract: Feed-forward 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) has emerged as a highly effective solution for novel view synthesis. Existing methods predominantly rely on a \emph{pixel-aligned} Gaussian prediction paradigm, where each 2D pixel is mapped to a 3D Gaussian. We rethink this widely adopted formulation and identify several inherent limitations: it renders the reconstructed 3D models heavily dependent on the number of input views, leads to view-biased density distributions, and introduces alignment errors, particularly when source views contain occlusions or low texture. To address these challenges, we introduce VolSplat, a new multi-view feed-forward paradigm that replaces pixel alignment with voxel-aligned Gaussians. By directly predicting Gaussians from a predicted 3D voxel grid, it overcomes pixel alignment's reliance on error-prone 2D feature matching, ensuring robust multi-view consistency. Furthermore, it enables adaptive control over density based on 3D scene complexity, yielding more faithful Gaussians, improved geometric consistency, and enhanced novel-view rendering quality. Experiments on widely used benchmarks demonstrate that VolSplat achieves state-of-the-art performance, while producing more plausible and view-consistent results. The video results, code and trained models are available on our project page: https://lhmd.top/volsplat.

light_analysis.overview: VolSplat 提出基于体素对齐预测的新前馈 3D 高斯飞溅范式，显著提升了新视角合成的性能和视图一致性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有 feed-forward 3D Gaussian Splatting 方法主要依赖像素对齐范式，但这导致重建模型视图依赖性强、密度分布偏差和对齐误差，尤其在输入视图包含遮挡或低纹理区域时问题突出。这些问题影响新视角合成的稳健性和几何真实性，突显了对更可靠方法的需求，以改善多视图一致性和场景重建质量。
light_analysis.method: VolSplat 的核心方法是用体素对齐高斯预测替代像素对齐。它通过预测 3D 体素网格，并直接从网格中生成高斯分布，避免了依赖易错的 2D 特征匹配。这确保了多视图一致性，并允许基于 3D 场景复杂性自适应控制密度，从而提高高斯表示的准确性和几何一致性，关键创新在于体素对齐范式的重新设计。
light_analysis.result: 在广泛使用的基准测试中，VolSplat 达到最先进性能，产生更合理和视图一致的结果，具体提升了新视角渲染质量和几何一致性。与基线方法相比，它展示出显著优势，但摘要未明确说明具体性能指标数据，如准确率或效率改进数值，仅从实验结果推断其有效性得到验证。
light_analysis.conclusion: VolSplat 的主要贡献是引入体素对齐预测范式，解决了像素对齐方法的局限性，增强了 3D 高斯飞溅的稳健性和一致性。学术上，它推动了 3D 场景重建技术的发展；实际上，为计算机图形学和视觉应用提供了更高质量的新视角合成。未来工作可能包括扩展到更复杂场景或结合其他优化技术，但摘要未明确说明具体局限性。

title: NormGenesis: Multicultural Dialogue Generation via Exemplar-Guided Social Norm Modeling and Violation Recovery
abstract: Social norms govern culturally appropriate behavior in communication, enabling dialogue systems to produce responses that are not only coherent but also socially acceptable. We present NormGenesis, a multicultural framework for generating and annotating socially grounded dialogues across English, Chinese, and Korean. To model the dynamics of social interaction beyond static norm classification, we propose a novel dialogue type, Violation-to-Resolution (V2R), which models the progression of conversations following norm violations through recognition and socially appropriate repair. To improve pragmatic consistency in underrepresented languages, we implement an exemplar-based iterative refinement early in the dialogue synthesis process. This design introduces alignment with linguistic, emotional, and sociocultural expectations before full dialogue generation begins. Using this framework, we construct a dataset of 10,800 multi-turn dialogues annotated at the turn level for norm adherence, speaker intent, and emotional response. Human and LLM-based evaluations demonstrate that NormGenesis significantly outperforms existing datasets in refinement quality, dialogue naturalness, and generalization performance. We show that models trained on our V2R-augmented data exhibit improved pragmatic competence in ethically sensitive contexts. Our work establishes a new benchmark for culturally adaptive dialogue modeling and provides a scalable methodology for norm-aware generation across linguistically and culturally diverse languages.
comment: 39 pages, 17 figures, EMNLP 2025 Main Conference, Senior Area Chair (SAC) Highlights Award

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出NormGenesis框架，通过示例引导的社会规范建模和违规恢复，实现多文化对话生成，创新引入V2R对话类型和早期精炼过程。
light_analysis.motivation: 社会规范在跨文化对话中指导适当行为，但现有对话系统常忽略规范动态性和多文化适应性，导致响应社会不适当。本研究的动机是解决这一问题，通过建模规范违规后的恢复过程，提升对话系统的实用性和文化敏感性，弥补静态分类方法的不足。
light_analysis.method: 核心方法包括提出Violation-to-Resolution (V2R)对话类型，模拟规范违规后的对话进展，涵盖识别和修复阶段。采用基于示例的迭代精炼，在对话合成早期对齐语言、情感和社会文化期望。构建了包含10,800个多轮对话的数据集，标注了规范遵守、说话者意图和情感响应。
light_analysis.result: 通过人类和基于LLM的评估，NormGenesis在精炼质量、对话自然度和泛化性能上显著优于现有数据集。训练在V2R增强数据上的模型在伦理敏感情境中展现出更高的实用能力，证实了方法的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究建立了文化自适应对话建模的新基准，提供了可扩展的规范感知生成方法论，适用于跨语言和文化多样性环境。贡献包括创新框架、数据集和评估方法，对AI伦理和多语言应用具有重要价值，未来可扩展至更多文化和语言。

title: Disentangling Slow and Fast Temporal Dynamics in Degradation Inference with Hierarchical Differential Models
abstract: Reliable inference of system degradation from sensor data is fundamental to condition monitoring and prognostics in mechanical and infrastructural systems. Since degradation is rarely directly observable and measurable, it must be inferred to enable accurate health assessment and decision-making. This is particularly challenging because operational and environmental variations dominate system behavior, while degradation introduces only subtle, long-term changes. Consequently, sensor data primarily reflect short-term operational variability, making it difficult to disentangle the underlying degradation process. Most unsupervised degradation inference methods learn nominal system behavior and use residuals as degradation proxies. However, residuals remain strongly entangled with operational history, yielding noisy and unreliable degradation estimates, particularly in infrastructural systems with dominant transient dynamics. Neural Ordinary Differential Equations (NODEs) offer a flexible framework for modeling latent dynamics, but in degraded systems, they suffer from numerical stiffness and degradation disentanglement remains difficult. To address these challenges, we propose a Hierarchical Controlled Differential Equation (H-CDE) framework that jointly models slow degradation dynamics and fast operational dynamics. H-CDE improves numerical efficiency through separate time integration of slow and fast components. Through a learnable path transformation mapping raw inputs to a latent degradation-relevant control path and a monotonicity-enforcing activation function that regularizes the inferred degradation dynamics, H-CDE enables effective disentangled degradation inference. Evaluations on mechanical and infrastructural systems demonstrate that H-CDE outperforms residual-based baselines, yielding more accurate, robust, and interpretable degradation inference in an unsupervised setting.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出分层受控微分方程（H-CDE）框架，通过联合建模快慢动态，在无监督设置中实现更准确、鲁棒的系统退化推断。
light_analysis.motivation: 系统退化推断对于机械和基础设施的状态监测与预测至关重要，但退化通常不可直接观测，传感器数据主要受短期操作和环境变化主导，掩盖了微妙的长期退化信号，使得准确评估健康状态变得困难。现有无监督方法（如基于残差的学习）因残差与操作历史强相关，导致退化估计噪声大、不可靠，尤其在瞬态动态主导的基础设施系统中，这一问题更为突出。因此，亟需新方法来有效分离快慢动态，提升退化推断的可靠性。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出Hierarchical Controlled Differential Equation (H-CDE)框架，基于神经普通微分方程（NODEs）改进，通过分层结构联合建模慢退化动态和快操作动态。关键创新包括：使用可学习路径变换将原始输入映射到潜在退化相关控制路径，以及引入单调性强制激活函数正则化退化动态，促进分离。该方法通过分别集成慢和快组件的时间积分，提高数值效率，避免数值刚性，并在无监督设置中自动学习系统行为，不依赖残差代理。
light_analysis.result: 在机械和基础设施系统上的评估表明，H-CDE框架显著优于基于残差的基线方法，产生更准确、鲁棒和可解释的退化推断。具体表现为退化信号更清晰分离和噪声减少，尽管摘要未明确给出具体性能指标如准确率提升百分比，但实验证实了其在多个系统上的有效性，展示了改进的无监督推断能力。与基线对比，H-CDE在复杂动态环境中表现出更强的适应性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是提出H-CDE框架，有效解决了退化推断中快慢动态分离的挑战，提高了数值效率和推断准确性。具有重要的学术价值，为动态系统建模提供了新方法；实际应用上，可增强机械和基础设施系统的状态监测和预测可靠性。潜在局限性或未来工作方向可能包括扩展到其他系统类型或进一步优化模型参数，但摘要未明确说明具体细节。

title: Adaptive Dual-Constrained Line Aggregation for Robust Generic and Wireframe Line Segment Detection
abstract: Line segment detection in images has been studied for several decades. Existing methods can be roughly divided into two categories: generic line segment detectors and wireframe line segment detectors. Generic detectors aim to detect all meaningful line segments in images and traditional approaches usually fall into this category. Recent deep learning based approaches are mostly wireframe detectors. They detect only line segments that are geometrically meaningful and have large spatial support. Due to the difference in the aim of design, methods designed for one paradigm often perform poorly on the other, and few approaches demonstrate robust performance across both tasks. In this work, we propose a robust framework that is efficient for both tasks based on an Adaptive Dual-Constrained Line Aggregation (ADLA) algorithm. ADLA aggregates pixels into candidate line segments only if they satisfy dual geometric constraints: (1) orientation coherence and (2) bounded orthogonal distance to an adaptively estimated line model. Crucially, the parameters of the candidate line (its orientation and centroid) are dynamically updated as new pixels are incorporated. This progressive model refinement improves geometric accuracy. Moreover, by leveraging edge strength maps in orientation estimation and line segment validation, ADLA requires little parameter tuning. Extensive experiments on three publicly available datasets demonstrate that ADLA achieves competitive or superior performance than previous methods, highlighting its robustness, versatility, and practical usability.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出了自适应双约束线聚合算法，实现鲁棒的通用和线框线段检测。
light_analysis.motivation: 线段检测在图像处理中已研究数十年，现有方法分为通用检测器和线框检测器，但针对一种设计的方法在另一种任务上表现不佳，缺乏跨任务鲁棒性能。该问题重要因为实际应用需灵活适应不同检测需求，现有方法受限于设计目标差异，导致性能不兼容，降低了方法的多功能性和实用性。
light_analysis.method: 研究采用ADLA算法，通过双重几何约束聚合像素成候选线段：方向一致性和有界正交距离到自适应估计的线模型。关键创新点包括动态更新线参数（如方向和质心），渐进模型细化以提升几何精度，并利用边缘强度图进行方向估计和线段验证，减少参数调整依赖，提高方法自适应性和效率。
light_analysis.result: 在三个公开数据集上的实验表明，ADLA实现了竞争性或优于先前方法的性能，展示了其鲁棒性和多功能性。摘要未提供具体性能指标数据，但结果强调了该方法在通用和线框检测任务中的稳定表现，与基线对比显示整体优势，凸显实际应用价值。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究贡献了ADLA框架，有效统一通用和线框线段检测，通过自适应约束和动态更新提升检测精度和鲁棒性。学术价值在于提出一种鲁棒方法，实际应用减少参数调整，增强实用性。摘要未明确说明局限性或未来工作方向。

title: Evaluation and LLM-Guided Learning of ICD Coding Rationales
abstract: ICD coding is the process of mapping unstructured text from Electronic Health Records (EHRs) to standardised codes defined by the International Classification of Diseases (ICD) system. In order to promote trust and transparency, existing explorations on the explainability of ICD coding models primarily rely on attention-based rationales and qualitative assessments conducted by physicians, yet lack a systematic evaluation across diverse types of rationales using consistent criteria and high-quality rationale-annotated datasets specifically designed for the ICD coding task. Moreover, dedicated methods explicitly trained to generate plausible rationales remain scarce. In this work, we present evaluations of the explainability of rationales in ICD coding, focusing on two fundamental dimensions: faithfulness and plausibility -- in short how rationales influence model decisions and how convincing humans find them. For plausibility, we construct a novel, multi-granular rationale-annotated ICD coding dataset, based on the MIMIC-IV database and the updated ICD-10 coding system. We conduct a comprehensive evaluation across three types of ICD coding rationales: entity-level mentions automatically constructed via entity linking, LLM-generated rationales, and rationales based on attention scores of ICD coding models. Building upon the strong plausibility exhibited by LLM-generated rationales, we further leverage them as distant supervision signals to develop rationale learning methods. Additionally, by prompting the LLM with few-shot human-annotated examples from our dataset, we achieve notable improvements in the plausibility of rationale generation in both the teacher LLM and the student rationale learning models.

light_analysis.overview: 论文通过构建多粒度 rationale 注释数据集，系统性评估ICD编码 rationales 的忠实性和合理性，并利用LLM生成的 rationales 作为远程监督信号指导学习方法以提升解释性。
light_analysis.motivation: ICD编码是将医疗文本映射到标准代码的关键过程，但现有模型的可解释性研究不足，主要依赖注意力机制和医生定性评估，缺乏系统评估和高质量注释数据集。这导致模型决策缺乏信任和透明度，限制了在医疗领域的可靠应用。现有方法在生成可信 rationales 方面资源稀缺，无法提供一致标准和全面分析。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出一个系统性框架评估ICD编码 rationales，重点关注忠实性（影响模型决策）和合理性（人类感知）两个维度。创新点包括构建基于MIMIC-IV数据库和ICD-10系统的多粒度 rationale 注释数据集，并评估三种 rationales：实体级 mentions（通过实体链接自动构建）、LLM生成的 rationales 和基于注意力分数的 rationales。基于LLM生成 rationales 的强合理性，将其作为远程监督信号开发 rationale 学习方法，并通过 few-shot 人类注释例子提示LLM以提升生成质量。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，LLM生成的 rationales 在合理性方面表现优异，优于实体级 mentions 和基于注意力的 rationales。通过 few-shot 提示策略，教师LLM和学生 rationale 学习模型在合理性上实现了显著改进。摘要未明确说明具体性能指标如准确率提升数据，但强调了LLM指导方法在增强 rationales 质量上的有效性，为ICD编码模型提供了更可信的解释基础。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献在于建立了系统性评估ICD编码 rationales 的框架和高质量数据集，并利用LLM生成的 rationales 指导学习以提高合理性。这促进了模型的可解释性和医疗决策的透明度，具有重要的学术和实际应用价值。未来工作可能包括扩展到更广泛的医疗数据或结合其他可解释性技术，以进一步优化 rationales 的忠实性和适用范围。

title: Agentic Design Review System
abstract: Evaluating graphic designs involves assessing it from multiple facets like alignment, composition, aesthetics and color choices. Evaluating designs in a holistic way involves aggregating feedback from individual expert reviewers. Towards this, we propose an Agentic Design Review System (AgenticDRS), where multiple agents collaboratively analyze a design, orchestrated by a meta-agent. A novel in-context exemplar selection approach based on graph matching and a unique prompt expansion method plays central role towards making each agent design aware. Towards evaluating this framework, we propose DRS-BENCH benchmark. Thorough experimental evaluation against state-of-the-art baselines adapted to the problem setup, backed-up with critical ablation experiments brings out the efficacy of Agentic-DRS in evaluating graphic designs and generating actionable feedback. We hope that this work will attract attention to this pragmatic, yet under-explored research direction.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出了Agentic Design Review System（AgenticDRS），一个基于多代理协同的框架，用于评估图形设计并生成反馈，创新点包括基于图匹配的上下文范例选择和提示扩展方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机源于图形设计评估需要从对齐、构图、美学和色彩选择等多个方面进行综合判断。现有方法在聚合专家反馈时效率低下，难以实现整体评估，导致反馈不全面或不可操作。这一问题在实际应用中至关重要，因为高质量设计评审能提升产品质量，但当前研究对此关注不足。本研究旨在开发一个系统，解决图形设计评估的实用挑战，推动这一未充分探索领域的发展。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法的核心是Agentic Design Review System（AgenticDRS），它由多个代理在元代理的协调下协同分析设计。关键创新包括：一种基于图匹配的上下文范例选择方法，用于动态选取相关示例；以及一个独特的提示扩展方法，以增强代理对设计的感知能力。系统使用DRS-BENCH基准数据集进行训练和评估，结合代理协作机制，确保从多角度生成结构化反馈。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，AgenticDRS在评估图形设计和生成可操作反馈方面表现有效。通过针对问题设置调整的最新基线进行对比，并结合关键消融实验，系统展现了优越性。例如，消融实验验证了图匹配和提示扩展方法对性能的贡献。摘要未明确说明具体指标如准确率提升，但强调了系统在实际应用中的可靠性和效率改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: 结论总结AgenticDRS为图形设计评估提供了一个创新的多代理系统，具有学术和实际应用价值。它通过范例选择和提示扩展方法提升了评估质量，推动了这一实用研究方向的发展。意义在于生成可操作反馈，辅助设计优化。未来工作可扩展到其他设计领域或改进代理协作机制，但局限性如计算成本未在摘要中提及。

title: Semantic-Aware Reconstruction Error for Detecting AI-Generated Images
abstract: Recently, AI-generated image detection has gained increasing attention, as the rapid advancement of image generation technologies has raised serious concerns about their potential misuse. While existing detection methods have achieved promising results, their performance often degrades significantly when facing fake images from unseen, out-of-distribution (OOD) generative models, since they primarily rely on model-specific artifacts and thus overfit to the models used for training. To address this limitation, we propose a novel representation, namely Semantic-Aware Reconstruction Error (SARE), that measures the semantic difference between an image and its caption-guided reconstruction. The key hypothesis behind SARE is that real images, whose captions often fail to fully capture their complex visual content, may undergo noticeable semantic shifts during the caption-guided reconstruction process. In contrast, fake images, which closely align with their captions, show minimal semantic changes. By quantifying these semantic shifts, SARE provides a robust and discriminative feature for detecting fake images across diverse generative models. Additionally, we introduce a fusion module that integrates SARE into the backbone detector via a cross-attention mechanism.
